plumbers.name: ABC Plumbing, Sewer, Heating, Cooling & Electric
plumbers.address: 220 W Campus Dr, Arlington Heights, IL 60004, USA

reviews.author: Misha Pendersen
reviews.text:
Edgar Rodriguez was a phenomenal representative of the company. He was professional, respectful, friendly, and knowledgeable. We also received a free total house inspection for all our plumbing and heating.

Greg Skalski and Pedro Olascoaga installed my new toilet and upgraded the main valve in my powder room. They, too, were professional, courteous, knowledgeable,
and expedient.

I highly recommend this company.

reviews.author: Scott Norman
reviews.text: Very professional and courteous. Did an amazing job with my project. He and his colleague came back early the next day and stayed 12 hours to make sure everything worked. Clean up was amazing. Highly recommend David for electrical needs. Super friendly and great attention to detail. 5 stars for ABC Electric. Will use again. If you get their AI system just follow the prompts, they will call you back quickly. Happy customer!

reviews.author: Samall Hazziez
reviews.text:
This is ‘Part 2’ from my August 16th post:  The ‘Actual Install’

If I attempt to communicate my satisfaction with the work, craftsmanship, and professionalism of Esteban and his partner Tyler, it would be an outright ‘INSULT’…!  These guys were (are), simply the best of the ‘BEST’…End-to-End they were focused and meticulous with their work and ‘QUALITY’ checks…WOW, I AM SO PLEASED WITH MY SYSTEM…!

The actual install/equipment removal was a site to see…’It was like Esteban/Tyler, were building a ‘CASTLE’…It was like they were handling ‘PRECIOUS CARGO’…. Layer, upon Layer…The discipline, the order, the patience (with my questions), their attentiveness to keeping the work area safe and clean.  When it came down to the ‘Verification & Validation’ activities for the system (Testing/Quality Checks), they left ‘ABSOLUTELY NO STONE UN-TURNED’…!

It has been a long, long, LOOONNNGGG-TIME, sense I (my family) was on the receiving end of excellent service and a quality assured, quality driven product solution.  I and my family are eternally grateful for what the ABC corporation has/is investing in their team[s].

From the point of my initial consult and problem eval/assessment with Bob and Tony, through the path of installation/solution validation (testing) with Esteban and Tyler, these guys were absolute champions.  Every home/business should (must) have at their fingertips a master HVAC point of contact.  I recommend (without giving it a second thought), the ABC Team.

I’m not ashamed to admit that I am (at times), a selfish man.  Esteban and Tyler had me believing that I had my own dedicated (quasi) service enablement team.  With that said, Bob M., I will be contacting you ASAP, for my next project/my next consult…’CONSIDER IT DONE’

reviews.author: Muminah Muhammad
reviews.text:
We are members of ABC and having a membership has its perks.  Our appointment had to be rescheduled twice due to dire emergencies and scheduling conflicts.

The third appointment ABC scheduled Mr. Darrell Bell, the Drain Technician to come out and inspect our drainage issue.  Mr. Bell was very professional, he introduced himself, listen to our issue and concerns, provided quality service and gave us the best solution going forward.

We were very impressed that he didn’t make a mess and cleaned up very well when the job was completed.

Well as they say, “the third time’s a charm”.  We are very satisfied with Mr. Bell’s service!

~The Muhammad Family

reviews.author: Sara Qawwas
reviews.text:
Jose was a great tech helping me with moving and putting back the radiators in my home for some restoration work being done. He was very attentive to details and worked extra time to make sure it was all done properly.

My 5 star review is mostly for him. Pricing wise I think they over charge quite a bit but I'm happy with the outcome of the work itself!

synthesis.summary: ABC Plumbing demonstrates exceptional professionalism and craftsmanship across all services, with technicians consistently praised for their attention to detail, cleanliness, and thorough work. With 24-hour emergency service and a 4.7/5 rating from nearly 23,000 reviews, they appear highly reliable for emergency situations, though expect premium pricing.
strengths: Meticulous attention to detail and quality
synthesis.topQuote: Every home/business should (must) have at their fingertips a master HVAC point of contact. I recommend (without giving it a second thought), the ABC Team.
synthesis.worstQuote: Pricing wise I think they over charge quite a bit but I'm happy with the outcome of the work itself!

plumbers.name: Black Diamond Plumbing & Mechanical Inc.
plumbers.address: 1400 Miller Pkwy, McHenry, IL 60050, USA

reviews.author: Shy Teal
reviews.text:
I’m a proud Diamond Member and officially part of the prestige family! My electrician was hands down the best — knowledgeable, patient, and professional from start to finish. I asked about 101 questions in under a minute, and he still managed to multitask, explain everything clearly, and get the job done right.

He even fixed the light in my kitchen over the sink — someone before me thought it made more sense to put a plug there instead of an actual light switch and outlet combo (don’t ask 😅). But he got it working perfectly!

Now I’ve got lights shining where there were no lights before! My utility room is beautifully lit with new canned lights — oh my God, excellent, très bien!

As a single woman, finding honest, respectful professionals means everything. I felt comfortable, informed, and completely taken care of. Black Diamond is a true one-stop shop — they go the extra mile and make your home shine, literally and figuratively!

reviews.author: Steven
reviews.text: Life savers! And I’m not even a customer. Well, I am now. I had a flat and without hesitation a representative from Black Diamond pulled over and hopped out with a battery operated compressor to help. It ended up being a pretty bad gash in the sidewall and wasn’t holding air. So he went back to the truck and got some rubber cement to help hold the air so I could get to a safer spot to change the tire. It was a busy two way street and he went above and beyond trying to help. And he did! Thank you so much. Praying I don’t having any plumbing issues, but if I do, I know who I’m calling.

reviews.author: J L
reviews.text:
I am so thankful for Black Diamond!

They have single handedly helped me repair and maintain my home with ease and savings since 2019.

Over the years, they have installed my furnace, air conditioner, replaced water shut off valves, garbage disposal, electric doorbell (Brennan was awesome), and most recently my water tank heater (Trevor and Keith were wonderful).

I always get several quotes for big repairs and Black Diamond is always the best!! They are worth every penny.  Honest up front pricing, no surprises, service windows are convenient, always on time, no employee turnover (i have had the same techs) and always knowledgeable and respectful. Their scheduling/customer service team is so kind and literally always answers my calls. Their quality is so good even my HVAC permit inspector raved about them when he came.

It is a god send to have one company offer the best service in all areas, plumbing,HVAC, and electrical and with the most experienced technicians, best schedulers/customer service, and for the best prices.

Thank you!

reviews.author: James Mashinter
reviews.text: I called Black diamond,about having my kitchen drain cleaned. Mario,was the plumbing technician who arrived on time. He looked over the situation,and got to work. He took great care in making sure my issue was resolved to the best of his abilities. I would highly recommend Black diamond,if all of their employees are as committed to excellent work,this is a company worth having a positive experience with.

reviews.author: Evette Rolon
reviews.text: First off I like to share that my family and I are not familiar with well water as we come from Chicago. We are not familiar with how well water works and almost gotten taking for a hell of a ride but thanks to Colten and black diamond they have been a blessing for my family and I. we HIGHLY recommend them especially Colton. Very intelligent, understanding, respectful, honest person. I work from home and the staff respected that and worked around my schedule. Everyone from the customer service department to the staff that came to work on our house were very polite and kind to us. Thank you for everything you have done for us. May God bless you guys.

synthesis.summary: Black Diamond Plumbing & Mechanical is a highly trusted full-service company with exceptional customer service and skilled technicians across plumbing, HVAC, and electrical work. With 4.9/5 stars from over 6,600 reviews and 24-hour service, they consistently deliver honest pricing, reliable scheduling, and quality work that even inspectors praise.
strengths: Honest, upfront pricing with no surprises
synthesis.topQuote: I always get several quotes for big repairs and Black Diamond is always the best!! They are worth every penny. Honest up front pricing, no surprises, service windows are convenient, always on time, no employee turnover (i have had the same techs) and always knowledgeable and respectful.

plumbers.name: Lifeline Plumbing, Heating & Cooling
plumbers.address: 296 Williams Pl, East Dundee, IL 60118, USA

reviews.author: Victor Haddock
reviews.text: Great turnaround. Hot water wet out yesterday evening. Less than 24 hours later we have a new water heater. Melissa in the back office was great giving us timing expectation. Kyle explained what happened to the old heater and what he did with the new one and why. They covered the floor ensuring where they walked was clean.

reviews.author: Paula Weisserth
reviews.text: The work was performed  on time, correctly and on budget. Not only did we need to replace the old and discharge pipe - We also had a leaking faucet outside that required creating an access panel inside. Erick is a great Technician! Not only was he knowledgeable, helpful, and well prepared- He was extremely polite and friendly! he cleaned up after he finished and even pointed out a few other Items we may want to update in the future for our rental property. I would highly recommend this company!

reviews.author: Vilia Drazdys
reviews.text: Miguel, our technician, was absolutely great. He was professional, knowledgeable and very courteous. He immediately assessed the issue with our sewer line and proposed a solution. He explained everything well (without talking down to us) and gave us the cost up front. He was very careful of our home and made sure all surfaces were protected before starting work.  When finished, Miguel cleaned everything and tested all drains several times to ensure everything was reconnected properly and that nothing leaked.

reviews.author: Ayomide Omole
reviews.text: I had a great experience with D’Andre , he came to fix my heat. He was extremely pleasant, professional, and respectful from start to finish. He arrived on time, explained everything clearly, and made sure the issue was fully resolved before leaving. You could tell he genuinely cared about doing a good job and making sure I was comfortable. Excellent customer service, great attitude, and very knowledgeable. I truly appreciate the quality of his work and would absolutely recommend him to anyone needing heating services.

reviews.author: John Kent
reviews.text: OK Art, we really appreciate your prompt response and coming over to diagnose the sewer line collapse. Also getting started tomorrow is fantastic. We really need your help with this one and you’re coming through.

synthesis.summary: Lifeline Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability with fast emergency response times and skilled technicians who explain work clearly. With nearly 5 stars across 3,281 reviews and consistent praise for professionalism, they appear highly trustworthy for emergency plumbing needs.
strengths: Fast emergency response (water heater replaced in under 24 hours)
Clear upfront pricing and detailed explanations
Excellent cleanup and protection of customer property
weaknesses: Limited sample of recent reviews to assess current performance
synthesis.topQuote: Less than 24 hours later we have a new water heater. Melissa in the back office was great giving us timing expectation. Kyle explained what happened to the old heater and what he did with the new one and why.

plumbers.name: Mendel Plumbing, Heating & Electric
plumbers.address: 3N640 N 17th St, St. Charles, IL 60174, USA

reviews.author: Chris Synal
reviews.text:
Mendel came out when the original home filter casing finally broke and started pouring out water. No other service company was willing to come or care for concern.

Within 25 minutes the technician showed up after I shut of the main to the house.  After a an unsuccessful install of the replacement the new housing was faulty also.  After listening and spending beyond the time to care and explain some future issues that might occur in other areas while he waiting couple of hrs for a new housing to arrive we finally have water (note was not the technician fault to wait to hrs it was the gentleman delivering the canister)

Thank you and look forward to working with Mendel in the future.

Attached is some before and after shot.

reviews.author: Brandon Gentile
reviews.text: Tonight I came home and heard running water.  I called Mendel to the first time and my experience couldn't have been more awesome!!  Jenna took my call and was so professional!  I was all worked up when I called and after she reassured me that a tech would be dispatched, I hung up with her feeling a little more at ease!  Jared was the technician that came out and he was just absolutely great from the second he walked in my door.  He quickly assessed the issue and gave me several options!  He showed me several pictures of the issue(I wasn't getting in the crawl space).  He explained every option and weighed the pros and cons of each option with me.  Once I decided, he had everything needed in his van and he got right to work.  Had the repair done in a fair amount of time and showed me pictures of all the work he did after.  I have future plumbing work that I will need and I will be asking for Jared to come do the work!  10/10 Recommend!

reviews.author: Ed Dziewior
reviews.text: Unfortunately woke up on Saturday morning to find our pipes had frozen due to the weather. Called for service and was assured that a technician would be arriving later this morning. Received a text with the technicians' name and estimate  time of arrival. Dave was the technician that arrived and promptly evaluated the situation we were having. He gave us an estimate for the repair and mentioned that if unseen issues appeared we would have to reevaluate the repair cost. This was acceptable to my wife and I. His inspection did not turn up any water leakage. He isolated the area that he felt was the area of concern. He went his truck to get a piece of equipment that would place a electrical charge to the copper pipe to try to heat the pipe and breakup the ice blockage. He was successful in removing the blockage. No damage to the drywall, no split pipe, and running water again throughout the house. Thank you Dave for your experience and dedication in resolving our issue. He has a pleasant personality, listens to your concerns, and does his job professionally and with efficiency which is reassuring.

reviews.author: Andrew Nickel
reviews.text:
My 78 year old mother, who lives alone, has used Mendel for years.  Recently moved and had them come inspect the furnace.  Technician said it was fine and just needed servicing.  A couple months later, the furnace seemed loud, so she had another tech come out.  This guy said the furnace (less than 10 years old) had deadly problems.  Actually turned the unit off and said he did not want to be in the house with the unit on.  Said needed full replacement right away.  A sales person came out later that day and quoted $25,000+ for new furnace and install.  Said they could come out the very next day, take her money, and put in the new one.  Rush, rush.

She had another company come out the next day and they said the humidifier needed a new part, but otherwise the furnace was perfectly fine.

Draw your own conclusions.

reviews.author: Kenneth Weber
reviews.text: They sent Paul out on very short notice. He solved our problems quicker than expected was super friendly and gave us great information and technical advice for how to avoid problems in the future. Will absolutely call them the next time we need a plumber.  And definitely I would request Paul if he is available he was OUTSTANDING!

synthesis.summary: Mendel Plumbing shows strong emergency response capabilities with quick arrival times and skilled technicians who communicate well. However, a concerning review about aggressive upselling tactics on a vulnerable elderly customer raises trust issues that can't be ignored.
strengths: Excellent emergency response times (25 minutes reported)
Skilled technicians who explain options clearly
Come equipped with necessary tools and parts
weaknesses: May target vulnerable customers for unnecessary expensive work
redFlags: One technician allegedly quoted $25,000+ for unnecessary furnace replacement to elderly customer when only humidifier part was needed
synthesis.topQuote: Within 25 minutes the technician showed up after I shut of the main to the house... After listening and spending beyond the time to care and explain some future issues that might occur in other areas while he waiting couple of hrs for a new housing to arrive we finally have water
synthesis.worstQuote: This guy said the furnace (less than 10 years old) had deadly problems. Actually turned the unit off and said he did not want to be in the house with the unit on. Said needed full replacement right away... quoted $25,000+ for new furnace and install

plumbers.name: Andersen Plumbing, Heating and AC Repair
plumbers.address: 700 Terry Ave, Aurora, IL 60506, USA

reviews.author: Anthony DiAngelo
reviews.text:
Highly recommend Joe and the Anderson team. Joe replaced our sump pump and was outstanding to work with. He took the time to educate us, clearly laid out all of our options, and explained the trade-offs so we could make an informed decision—no pressure, just solid guidance. The quality of the work was excellent.

We’ve had Anderson out to our house multiple times over the past few months for different issues, and each experience has been consistently superb. Professional, knowledgeable, and reliable service every time. We wouldn’t hesitate to call Joe or Anderson again.

reviews.author: Mariah Wright
reviews.text: Nate & Zach were great! They were on time, very polite and very knowledgeable. Immediately was able to identify the issue and provide a solution. Walked me through everything in a way I understood. Great service all around! “Im just a girl” lol and I was able to explain the issue no problem to my husband as well. 10/10!!

reviews.author: Jeanette Hoffman
reviews.text: Jon and Cesar came out to diagnose a noise I heard coming from the furnace. They arrived quickly, were polite and professional and did a thorough inspection of the entire furnace. They were able to figure out the issue and discussed with me the other things they saw that looked like they should be addressed to keep the furnace running smoothly. They offered me different options on what to repair urgently and what should be addressed but could wait a bit longer. They were not pushy at all and explained everything thoroughly while showing me pictures of what they were seeing. I continue to use Anderson because every time I’ve needed them this is the same reliable and professional service I receive.

reviews.author: Max
reviews.text:
I recently had a bathtub faucet installed by Andersen, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. Evan and Michelle were professional, courteous, and clearly knew what they were doing. They took the time to make sure everything was installed properly and working perfectly before they left.

Their workmanship was clean and precise, and they made sure the area was spotless when the job was finished. It’s clear they take pride in the quality of their work. I would definitely recommend this company to anyone looking for reliable and professional plumbing services.

reviews.author: Andre Porche
reviews.text:
We had an outstanding experience working with Joe Harkins. From the moment he arrived, he demonstrated a high level of professionalism, knowledge, and attention to detail. He took the time to thoroughly assess our home and carefully identify the source of the leak, explaining each step of the process in a clear and reassuring manner.
Joe truly went above and beyond to ensure we felt confident that the issue was properly diagnosed and that our system was secure. His expertise and patience gave us peace of mind during what could have been a very stressful situation.
In addition, he provided thoughtful recommendations for trusted services that could assist with the necessary repairs. That extra level of guidance showed that he genuinely cares about his clients and the long-term well-being of their homes.
We highly recommend Joe Harkins to anyone in need of a knowledgeable, dependable, and customer-focused professional.

synthesis.summary: Andersen Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability with consistently professional technicians who take time to educate customers and explain all options without pressure. Multiple customers praise their thorough diagnostics, quality workmanship, and ability to handle both emergency situations and planned repairs with the same high standard of service.
strengths: Thorough diagnosis and explanation of issues
weaknesses: All reviews are 5-star which may indicate selective sampling
synthesis.topQuote: We've had Anderson out to our house multiple times over the past few months for different issues, and each experience has been consistently superb. Professional, knowledgeable, and reliable service every time.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 650 E Terra Cotta Ave #110, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Esther O
reviews.text: Jonathan was super helpful with my plumbing issue and made sure there were no leaks after the job was done. He was very kind and worked quickly and professionally. I would recommend him to anyone who needs an understanding plumber.

reviews.author: Mary Hawkins
reviews.text: Bruno & Steve were very helpful not only at talking me through what caused our main line slowness/backup, but also daily preventative measures. We were also able to talk through bigger picture needs down the line. Our home is an investment, and they were easy to talk to about protecting it. Never felt like I was getting upsold.

reviews.author: Epic Battle Reenactments
reviews.text: Roto-Rooter was swift to respond to my request. The technician they sent, Azzi, arrived promptly on site and demonstrated his skill and expertise at handling the fixes and installation required. He was dedicated to completing the task on my behalf and overall was a pleasant interaction. I am very satsified with his work and the experience given!

reviews.author: Eric Ohlrich
reviews.text:
Our house has had issues with roots clogging drainage pipes for years so we have had a few different companies come and resolve the issue, Roto-Rooter was very thorough, Israel and Mike were very professional, kind, and patient. They explained everything they were doing and why, even giving us information about our pipes and issues that could arise later on. Israel and Mike didn’t just stop once the clog was cleared, they went through the pipes multiple times in order to guarantee the pipes were completely clear and told us the further steps to take.

The price was a bit steep, it was around 720$ for them to do this service which hurt, but unfortunately it wasn’t too surprising.

Overall, overpriced, but they were very knowledgeable and took the job seriously and worked through it thoroughly. Will be using Roto-Rooter again, after our wallet recovers 😅

reviews.author: Sagar Mehta
reviews.text: This is from Saturday morning. Bruno, Steven & Kyle came to check in the drainage issue. After going to the root cleaning in the pipeline process they were able to pull the roots and waste. The pipeline has got some real issue that merges into the city sewer. All them tried really hard and put in 5+ hours of work. They are helpful and I recommend them for your services

synthesis.summary: Roto-Rooter shows strong technical expertise and professionalism with technicians who explain their work thoroughly and go above and beyond to ensure complete repairs. While pricing is on the higher side, customers consistently praise their knowledge, dedication, and thorough approach to resolving plumbing issues.
strengths: Thorough work - go beyond minimum requirements
weaknesses: Premium pricing that can be steep
Limited sample size for emergency response times
synthesis.topQuote: Israel and Mike didn't just stop once the clog was cleared, they went through the pipes multiple times in order to guarantee the pipes were completely clear and told us the further steps to take.
synthesis.worstQuote: The price was a bit steep, it was around 720$ for them to do this service which hurt, but unfortunately it wasn't too surprising.

plumbers.name: Tidy Tank Plumbing, Sewer, and Septic
plumbers.address: 740 McArdle Dr, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Kevin Morrison
reviews.text: Great experience with Tidy Tank Septic! Brad handled my septic pumping and was incredibly helpful. Not only did he get the job done smoothly, but he also took the time to explain my whole setup and what to watch for over time. I left the visit knowing a lot more about my system and confident about when I’ll need service next. I’ll absolutely be calling them again. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Hyung J. Kim, MD
reviews.text: They performed residential septic tank service at my house. They did a wonderful job. They were professional and courteous. I highly recommend Ron's Tidy Septic Tank Service!!

reviews.author: Sabine Vosters
reviews.text: Was contacted by Tidy Tank Septic reminding me that the last service had been almost three years ago, and did I want to schedule a service. Set up an appointment for the very next day. They arrived at the scheduled time and got the job done thoroughly and efficiently. They explained what they were doing and documented everything in pictures and on the invoice. Their prices have gone up quite a bit since our last appointment, but I guess it's on par with every other price increase in the country. A very professional experience all around, I would definitely recommend this business to anyone looking for septic tank maintenance.

reviews.author: Terry A
reviews.text: I called Tidy Tank plumbing because my sump pump line broke. Dan was here within 45 minutes. He looked at the obvious issue but then investigated further to make sure that there were no other related issues such as frozen drain lines, etc. He went through all of the options from doing a simple repair to replace it with a top quality sump pump and backup system. He did not push me in any direction nor try to upsell me. Once the choice was made he had all of the equipment on the truck, completed the work, tested the system, and cleaned up. I've always had very good luck with their septic service and now I can add their plumbing service to that.

reviews.author: angelique archos solhi
reviews.text: TJ was polite and very professional.  He was even better at his job!  He replaced a disposal and faucet as well as reconfiguring the entire pipe system. He explained everything that needed to be done and was quick and efficient.  I will recommend him to my friends and family. I will also use his services in my new home going forward. Excellent!

synthesis.summary: Tidy Tank demonstrates excellent reliability with fast emergency response (45 minutes for sump pump repair) and thorough, professional service across plumbing and septic work. Their technicians are knowledgeable, explain work clearly, and don't oversell, making them a solid choice for emergency plumbing needs.
weaknesses: Limited sample of emergency plumbing reviews
synthesis.topQuote: Dan was here within 45 minutes. He looked at the obvious issue but then investigated further to make sure that there were no other related issues such as frozen drain lines, etc. He went through all of the options from doing a simple repair to replace it with a top quality sump pump and backup system. He did not push me in any direction nor try to upsell me.
synthesis.worstQuote: Their prices have gone up quite a bit since our last appointment, but I guess it's on par with every other price increase in the country.

plumbers.name: Fly Plumbing & HVAC
plumbers.address: 584 Chaddick Dr, Wheeling, IL 60090, USA

reviews.author: Catherine Ortiz
reviews.text:
Great service. Respectful to our property and cleaned up after work was completed.
We needed an outdoor spigot replaced and they recommended an anti-freeze spigot which I had no idea was an option.
They send us pics of the completed job and accommodated a service latch.
Shawn did a great job. This is our second time using their services and they do not disappoint. I recommend Fly Plumbing.

reviews.author: Michael Hansen
reviews.text: A very positive experience with Fly Plumbing. The company is always very responsive and goes above & beyond. I had a back up in my basement on a Sunday evening. I was able to easily reach them and set up a next day appointment (they had offered same day service, but the water had gone down). I requested Adrian (he had been out before) and they accommodated my request without issue. Adrian and Ben came out and addressed the issue. They were communicative, knowledgeable, kind and attentive. They remedied my issue & left my home clean. I highly recommend Adrian, Ben & Fly Plumbing!

reviews.author: Courtney Biewald
reviews.text: Miguel and Adrian were amazing. They really helped explain the process of everything they did and tips for the future. I will 100% be a returning customer and will be recommending them to everyone in the area! Thank you again! Excellent service.

reviews.author: yaakov sugarman
reviews.text: Adrian was amazing! He was very thorough and a pleasure to work with. He explained everything clearly, and I would definitely use him again.

reviews.author: Manny Arenivas
reviews.text: Got some work done on a few drains in my basement that were overflowing. Mikhail and Mickey did a great job getting everything sealed and cleaned. Very polite, friendly, and efficient. I will only go with this crew for any job moving forward. 5 stars.

synthesis.summary: Fly Plumbing & HVAC appears to be a highly reliable company with excellent emergency response and professional service. Customers consistently praise their knowledgeable technicians, cleanliness, and clear communication, making them a strong choice for emergency plumbing needs.
weaknesses: All reviews are 5-star (may not show full picture)
synthesis.topQuote: I had a back up in my basement on a Sunday evening. I was able to easily reach them and set up a next day appointment (they had offered same day service, but the water had gone down). Adrian and Ben came out and addressed the issue. They were communicative, knowledgeable, kind and attentive.

plumbers.name: Restore Plumbing and Drain
plumbers.address: 1401 Timber Dr, Elgin, IL 60123, USA

reviews.author: Barbara Diepenbrock
reviews.text: Quick in and out.  Half as much as a plumbing company I've been using for years with the same product and quality.  Friendly and fast.  I believe in paying fair wages and paying what for what you get but the other guys were ridiculous for what the job is.  If I wasn't old and fat now....I could do it myself but it would take me a whole day lol!  Thank you Restore Plumbing for being accessible and affordable without losing the fantastic service and quality.

reviews.author: Mike Dudek
reviews.text:
Absolute incredible experience from start to finish with the Restore team. From my very first phone call, everything was handled professionally, clearly, and with real care. The consultation with Dave was thorough and straightforward. He took the time to explain the system, answer questions, and make sure I was comfortable with every step before moving forward.

The installation work completed by John and CJ was equally impressive. They were punctual, respectful of my home, and clearly took pride in their work. The install was clean, efficient, and well explained, and they made sure everything was working properly before they left. It is obvious this team knows what they are doing and genuinely cares about delivering a great experience, not just finishing a job.

It is rare to work with a company where every touchpoint feels this well run and thoughtful. I would give this group 1000 stars if I could. Restore has absolutely earned my long term business, and I will confidently refer them to anyone I know who needs reverse osmosis or plumbing solutions. I truly appreciated the experience and could not recommend them more highly.

reviews.author: Ula Borodzinska
reviews.text: We had Kohler Veil "smart" toilet repair (still under warranty luckily).   Jonathan was on time, super polite and professional. He quickly determined issue and fixed it perfectly. Thank you Jonathan! If needed in a future I will be calling them and requesting Jonathan's services.

reviews.author: Pat Pornsakwiwat
reviews.text: The shower had no hot water. We called Restore plumbing and drain. The woman who answered the phone was very nice. John came the next day to inspect and explain the possibilities in detail. He was extremely patient and tried to fix the problem. Finally, we had hot water running. Very happy with the service we received from John.👍👍

reviews.author: Larry Wetzel
reviews.text: This is the second big job I have had in my house plumbing-wise.  Restore has done an outstanding job from start to finish. My technician, Virginio, was absolutely fantastic on explaining everything and performing the work.  Thanks again.  Will talk to you in the future.

synthesis.summary: Restore Plumbing and Drain appears to be an excellent choice for emergency plumbing needs, with consistent praise for professional technicians, fair pricing, and quality work. All reviews highlight punctual, respectful service with thorough explanations and problem-solving.
synthesis.topQuote: Absolute incredible experience from start to finish with the Restore team. From my very first phone call, everything was handled professionally, clearly, and with real care.

plumbers.name: MPT Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 1520 Industrial Dr, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156, USA

reviews.author: Bob Lescaleet

reviews.text: Called MPT Plumbing (Mike) to address a minor leak after a water meter replacement late last week. He called, they listened to his explanation of what happened and promptly scheduled to come out the day to fix this issue. Mike is a true honest business owner that genuinely cares about his customers and goes well beyond the norm in regards to typical customer service. I am incredibly grateful to have met this good man today. Thank you for your service and insight today.

reviews.author: Gina K
reviews.text: Mike saved me from a major disaster with a sink install. He came in and took over the situation and I’m grateful for his professionalism and direction. He even set me up with other contractors to help with other needed services. Great guy. Highly recommended MPT!

Very professional, very kind.

I would recommend this company to everyone.

reviews.author: Joe Rodriguez
reviews.text: I’m a caregiver for my mom. Had a sewer line collapse and needed to get it fixed to make sure she had what she needed. Dave and his crew were great to work with. Very professional and efficient and kind. Easy to work with. They showed up when they said they would, kept me informed and when I thought there was another issue they were quick to address it. Enjoyed working with them. 👏

reviews.author: Ruth Wojak
reviews.text:
The owner Dave came out and assessed the situation. He realized that the plumber the day before didn't do their due diligence. He called them immediately and had them out again within 20 minutes to finish what they should have finished the day before.
The job that Dave was hired to do, he explained that it needed to be done, but was probably not an emergency.  He actually called me three times after he left, to make sure that I was doing good with my present situation (which was a rusted through kitchen stack, which was now full of mud).
The guys who came and did the work were fantastic. Arrived on time. I received a text with their location, so I knew when exactly they would arrive, should they be delayed. They were courteous, quick, clean, friendly.... Can't say enough good about them.
When they left, I went down to clean the path to the work zone. They literally left the area cleaner than when they arrived. I assumed they would make a mess, so I didn't vacuum up the dust that is frequently in a basement. I also didn't clean up the mess from the basement being flooded. All was cleaned up. True, they jack hammered part of the floor out, but they also cleaned more than just the area they jackhammered.
Top notch company. I would hire them again in an instant.

reviews.author: Lindsey Idle
reviews.text:
Dave is awesome… such a good guy. I own a home bakery, so my pipes are definitely used more often than others.

I had a pretty major blockage this morning and not only did Dave come out on time but he brought all the necessary equipment as well as some preventative care for me to hold onto. He gave me great advice on how to avoid blockages in the future and made sure I knew how to use the drain treatment product to get the best results.

Honest plumbers can be hard to come by but these guys are absolutely fantastic

reviews.text:
The crew as well as the staff at the office were extremely professional and extremely helpful. They helped us achieve a workable solution for our needs. All expenses were discussed upfront so that there were no unexpected financial surprises. They communicated their arrival times via text. Our experience was top notch and we would definitely reach out to them for any needs in the future.
They dug up our broken pipe, installed new pipe, installed a sump pump which we did not have before, and poured concrete. Great job.

He showed me areas concern, and told me what to do to make sure the problem we had would not be back, but if it does come back, we know who to call!

Robert Camargo came out the very next day (today) and just wrapped up his visit. He was extremely personable and genuinely a pleasure to talk with. Robert is honest, straightforward, and clearly very knowledgeable in his field. The way he explained the issue—with clear options for how to proceed and what each option would mean both now and in the future—made everything easy to understand.
His communication style, paired with his expertise, gave us a lot of confidence moving forward. We truly appreciated having someone like Robert take the time to walk us through everything so thoroughly.

reviews.text: I have been using AMY Home Services for 18 years !!  I currently have (3) products a water heater,  air conditioner and furnace.  Good products reasonably priced and great service.  The air conditioner and furnace come with 10 year warranties.  I’m signed up with a service agreement that covers annual inspections to keep these products under warranty.  The crew always offers great tips on what home owners can do to minimize service calls.  I’m a happy customer.

reviews.text: We have been clients with Amy Home Services for more than 10 years and have used them for electrical, HVAC plumbing. Don't think there is anything in our house they have not touched!!! Techs always reliable and get the job done. Would not consider ising anyone else! Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: Jacob Reisbich
reviews.text: Had the last thing you want during a cold wave with our boiler giving us no heat to the entire house and Justin was able to come out quickly and troubleshoot the issue. Ended up being a rather simple fix in form of a malfunctioning damper, but Justin was also able to temporarily provide heat to house while we waited for the part to arrive. When it did get here the replacement was about as quick as you could ask for and at a very reasonable price. Ended up having a circulating pump that was also on the way out and got that fixed as well. Given the age of my home and it being worked on by a good handful of contractors throughout the years Justin handled everything very professionally. My favorite part is he not only fixed our issues, but was thorough in explaining how he also detected the issues so these things can be better avoided in the future. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Kevin Sanchez
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with Amy Home Services and Jake installing my new water softener. He showed up on time, was extremely professional, and clearly knew exactly what he was doing. He took the time to explain the system and walked me through everything I needed to know.

The installation was done quickly and cleanly, with great attention to detail. Jake even cleaned up the workspace afterward, which I really appreciated. Since the install, everything has been working perfectly—I can already notice the improvement in my water!

Highly recommend Jake for anyone needing any plumbing services. He made the whole process stress-free and seamless. Great service all around!

reviews.author: Dave Snyder
reviews.text: This is not as easy as it may sound. Trevor and Jason removed the entire furnace system and replaced it in a day. Not only the outside condenser unit but the inside furnace and blower system. Trevor had noted that the size of the trunk was smaller than recommended and completely modified the system to enable a greater airflow. There were many changes to the system requirements based on updated HVAC code, which Trevor explained. In general, the overall reworking of the system was done smoothly and with hardly any change to our home system, except of course, the whole furnace and outdoor unit. Amy has done many upgrades to our home and my Wife and I are very pleased with the work that was done in the past as well as this particular upgrade.

synthesis.summary: Amy Home Services is a highly reliable full-service company with 18+ years of proven track record and excellent emergency response. They consistently deliver professional work with thorough explanations and fair pricing, making them an excellent choice for both emergency repairs and planned installations.

reviews.author: Cordell Walker
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful experience with 1-Tom-Plumber from start to finish. They answered my call right away after I discovered my old water heater was leaking, which honestly caught me off guard since it was only about 8 years old. I had a big bulky 75-gallon Richmond power-vent water heater, and by the time I noticed the issue, water was leaking throughout my basement.

To make matters worse, some of my existing plumbing lines were already corroded and beginning to leak as well. I went a full week without hot water while trying to figure out the best long term solution, which was incredibly stressful.

When 1-Tom-Plumber came out, they were professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to explain all of my replacement options without pressure. After talking it through, I decided to upgrade to a tankless “endless hot water” system. I’m so glad I did.

The new system works amazingly well. I never run out of hot water, and unlike traditional systems, it doesn’t require a specific hard-water softener, so I didn’t have to invest in an additional water softening system. It also doesn’t require costly yearly flushes, which was a huge plus for me.

On top of that, the system comes with a 15-year manufacturer warranty and is made right here in America, which gave me even more confidence in my decision. The workmanship was truly top-notch, the installation was clean, and everything was explained clearly along the way.

I’m extremely happy with my experience and the upgrade. If you’re dealing with water heater issues or considering going tankless, I highly recommend 1-Tom-Plumber. They made a stressful situation so much easier and delivered excellent results.

reviews.author: Cy Nick
reviews.text: What I thought was a simple laundry clog turned out to be a much larger sewer job. reviews.author: Ben Isaacs
reviews.text:
We were in the process of having a bathroom remodeled, and just our luck, our water heater goes out. I was recommended to contact Helton Plumbing by our contractors. I spoke with the owner, Jeremy, who was very helpful in my time of panic. Jeremy was able to give me the information about upgrading to different types of water heaters: tankless, tanked and power vent. What I appreciated was the upfront tasks required to install each one, as well as the pros and cons of each unit. We ended up going with the Navian tankless water heater. I've included pictures of the before and after.

Carey was my technician for the project. I cannot say enough about how magnificent Carey was. Answered all my questions, explained the process, gave me insight on the new product (including gas use, electrical use, rebate possibilities, etc). Additionally, Carey completed this entire task by himself, wasting no time to get the project going - it was an all day task. Carey even recommended a type of recirculation valve in the primary bathroom that will help to heat the primary bathroom faster (it is the furthest away from the water heater, so historically the shower took 60+ seconds to get hot). The recirculation valve and new water heater have the primary bathroom hot in under 10 seconds. It is sorcery.

I am very pleased with the service. Words can't explain how much we are enjoying the new water heater and the constant hot water. Also, the floor space that it opened up is monumental too. I will say that to go from a tank to tankless, it is an investment. It is expensive to make the change. It is definitely worth it - high efficient appliance, lower gas bill and constant hot water. We have young children and always worried about those 'hot pockets' of water in a tank water heater burning one of our kids. The tankless is so consistent I wish our Chicago Bears would take note. Overall, couldn't be happier with how it turned out. If you are on the market for a new water heater, consider Helton Plumbing. They fixed my issue entirely in one day!

reviews.author: Georgia Kelly
reviews.text: I came home from vacation to a leaking pipe and puddle of water on the floor. Helton was able to come within a couple of hours. Carey immediately put my mind at ease. He diagnosed the problem and explained it to me with a photo. He gave me an estimate before he began the work. He had everything he needed to replace the cracked piece of pipe and worked efficiently and professionally. He was friendly and courteous. This was the second time I’ve used Helton and have been 100% satisfied. Julie who took my call was great also.

reviews.author: Robert
reviews.text:
We have used Helton plumbing many times over the years for various issues (water heater and other pipe related problems)
They always do an excellent job. Yesterday they replaced three toilets in our house. Their tech arrived on time and looked over our problems and gave me two options to solve it. One- to rebuild the toilet ( new parts) or two- to replace the entire fixture. We opted for replacement. He had to pick up the fixtures an hour away and then come back to begin. One man on his own and he removed and replaced all three units in three hours. After removing one of the toilets he found a broken flange that needed replacing. And he was equipped for that too.
He removed the toilets and wrapped each one in plastic so nothing dropped on our floors.
He arrived on time and did the job quickly and cleanly. He took the old toilets and all of the cartons and garbage left over from the install to dispose of. If I could give them more than five stars I would.

reviews.author: Aaron
reviews.text:
$35,000 DISASTER FROM A SIMPLE CLOGGED TOILET!!!

We called "Emergency Plumbing" with a clogged toilet in August 2024. After their plumber visited us, we ended up with THREE ROOMS DESTROYED BY WATER AND SEWAGE, costing $35,000 IN REPAIRS that took SEVERAL MONTHS, and then later getting dropped by our brand new homeowners insurance due to the claim!

"Emergency Plumbing" happily took my several hundred dollars in payment for "clearing the clogged toilet". They have offered no recompense for causing our massive loss. But, to their credit, they did say "sorry" a couple times.

THE FULL, DISGUSTING, DANGEROUS, SAD STORY:

In August 2024 I called about a clogged toilet I couldn't plunge clear. They were able to schedule a plumber for early in the morning.

He tried an auger to clear the clog, to no avail. So, he asked to see the sewer cleanout. We went to the basement, where things were about to go DANGEROUSLY BAD.

He opened up the cleanout and A FIRE HOSE RIVER OF SEWAGE immediately began to spray out onto him and our finished basement. He panicked and asked for garbage cans / bags to catch the sewage river.

My wife brought down some large utility garbage bags. The plumber and I held up and filled about 3-4 large bags of sewage over our heads during the next several minutes before the flow finally stopped and he could cap off the cleanout. He reassured me by saying, "sometimes stuff like this happens". We were both drenched in sewage from head to toe. Some had splashed in my eyes and mouth.

He started to hand mop up the large sewage puddle with some paper towels. I told him "don't bother, this all will need a mitigation company". He replied, "all you really need is some soap and water". Ummm no.

We dried off, shedded clothes and went back upstairs. The toilet still wouldn't drain, so he said he'd drive back to get the larger auger. He asked if I had any toilets upstairs, and I replied yes. He said "OK, you can use your upstairs toilet and shower, just don't use the clogged one down here". He left and I started to shower.

After showering I came back down to the main floor to discover that SHOWER WATER WAS GUSHING OUT OF THE TOILET INTO OUR BATHROOM AND HALLWAY!!! More fun!

In the second panic of the day, I tried my best to dam up the NEW RIVER OF WATER now FLOODING my main level hardwood floors. I ran downstairs to see even more water now soaking many ceiling tiles and raining onto the sauna and floor.

I called the plumber and the head plumber agreed to come join the fun. He arrived, I explain the scene, and he said "Oh no, he should never have told you to use the fixtures upstairs". Oh no!

The first plumber later returned with the larger auger. They managed to clear the clog with it. They did some hand mopping up of the now destroyed first floor powder room, hallway, hall closet, and living room. They asked for a check for several hundred dollars, said sorry for the problems, took my check and left.

The next day we opted for a water & sewage mitigation company, rather than the plumber's recommendation of "soap and water". We then watched much of our house get ripped apart and endured days of loud fans a dehumidifiers.

The insurance claim process and reconstruction took place over the next couple months. We had to cancel our Thanksgiving party, as we were still wrapping up the rebuild by then.In the weeks after the plumbing adventure, I texted and called the plumber, hoping to get some recompense for this disaster, maybe cover my insurance deductible, maybe even my money back? We talked on the phone once and I made my case. He didn't offer anything at all. Haven't heard from them since.

0 STARS - CANNOT RECOMMEND FOR ANY PLUMBING WORK. Maybe the head plumber is good? But whatever junior plumber they sent to unclog my toilet basically destroyed much of my new house. They were arrived on time and were friendly to talk to, though, tiny bonus points for that. ONE QUARTER OF A STAR

reviews.text:
I called A.C.T because I had a problem with a brand new hose for my sump pump that wasn't connected right.

Water was shooting out from the base of the hose. I did ask my landscaper if he could install this brand new hose for me because i was in a pinch and he said yes.  He said he would charge me $60 for a very simple job.

However...i needed this done so i paid him $60 to do this. A couple days later when we had some bad rain i was outside and noticed the  hose was shooting out water of the base of the hose.  The same thing that happened to my old hose that i needed to replace with the new hose.The only difference was the old hose actually had a split in the hose (because it was old) so I needed to buy a new hose.

When A.C.T. came out he told me right away the landscaper didn't tighten the hose in a couple spots leaving water to shoot out from the base of the hose.

Prior to all this i did called the landscaper to tell him what happened he told me it wasn't an emergency and it could wait.  That didn't make me very happy because i paid him $60 to do the job right and when i told him what happened he didn't at all seem alarmed and couldn't be at my house for about 3 days. I was shocked.

Thats when i talked to my neighbor and they recommended A.C.T. and i can see why... he was excellent, and charge me a trip charge which I felt was very fair. He came out on a Sunday and he fixed the problem, and above all done it right the first time.

The purpose of this review is to solely let people know that there are good trusting, reputable companies that truly care about their customers.

A.C.T. the owner Ron did not hesitate to come to my aid to help me out
ASAP and fix the problem.

Easy fix...however, the problem was the landscaper he did not tighten the hoses.

Next time ill go with the professionals.

Thanks to Ron for all his help it meant the world to me.  Now I can sleep knowing the job was done right the first time.
