reviews.text: Dylan and Mark are extremely professional, honest, courteous and competent. Showed up 5 minutes early and texted 30 minutes before to confirm. Replaced a toilet and a kitchen faucet. Cleaned up afterwards. Left no mess. Highly recommended. Will use again as needed.

reviews.author: Austin Welte
reviews.text: 110% satisfied! Dylan is knowledgeable, timely, professional and clean. He absolutely blows the other plumbers I’ve used out of the water. Based on what I’ve paid for smaller jobs, I feel that Turner Plumbings pricing is fair and competitive. This is the only company I’ll call from now on. I originally reached out directly through Google and got a response almost immediately. From there, Dylan took over with phone calls and texts which was perfect. He delt with the city directly and coordinated with them for repairs on our mains and I didn’t have to lift a finger. I would give 10 stars if I could.

reviews.author: Alicia Kellogg
reviews.text: These people are amazing! Every time they come I am wayyyy more than satisfied. Great thorough job, and very great prices. I only call Turner Plumb when I have an issue. I trust them 💯

reviews.author: GORDON AKEY
reviews.text: I have nothing but great things to say about Turner Plumbing. I had a toilet that was leaking and had to be replaced. Dylan came over almost immediately gave me a price for the whole project. He removed my old toilet and replace it with a new one the very next day. Turner Plumbing did an excellent job for a fair price.

reviews.author: leea herriman
reviews.text: To say Turner Plumbing did an outstanding job is an understatement but no other words completely describe the wonderful work  they did; which included multiple  jobs from my bathroom to kitchen and even the outside and I can say honestly everything was done beautifully. Trust if I have any other plumbing issues they will be the first people I call.

synthesis.summary: Turner Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability and professionalism with 117 perfect 5-star reviews, consistently delivering quality work with fair pricing. Dylan and the team show strong responsiveness and attention to detail, making them a solid choice for emergency plumbing needs.
strengths: Excellent cleanup and attention to detail
synthesis.topQuote: 110% satisfied! Dylan is knowledgeable, timely, professional and clean. He absolutely blows the other plumbers I've used out of the water. Based on what I've paid for smaller jobs, I feel that Turner Plumbings pricing is fair and competitive.

plumbers.name: K.B.I Sewer & Drainage
plumbers.address: 2016 W Indian Ridge Dr, Johnsburg, IL 60051, USA

reviews.author: PermablockTank - FukCal51
reviews.text: Keith and his crew were awesome. They replaced a section of sewer line under my basement floor. Right on time. Super polite. Kept me informed the whole time. Oh, and the work is top notch. Definitely recommend these guys.

reviews.author: Ashleigh Holley
reviews.text: KBI was super respectful and professional when they came to install our new water heater. We had bought our own water heater and had them install it for us. Keith Jr. was so nice and respectful. He did a great job on the installation and even ran out to get a drip pan that we had requested. The price was very reasonable and way less than I expected. We will be using them for all our plumbing needs in the future!

reviews.author: James Kutz
reviews.text:
I had a Sunday afternoon backup of sewage in my basement floor drain. I called and spoke to Keith Jr., who made it by the same day within a couple hours. He talked me through the process and accurately quoted me the cost over the phone. A couple hours later, my sewage line was flowing again. He provided me with some long term solutions and estimates regarding the coming months/years so that I could begin planning for similar issues in the future. He was kind, patient, informative, and diligent considering I needed his services on a Sunday evening. Based on my research, his pricing was very competitive considering the time of the week.

Thank you Keith Jr.!

reviews.author: Jon G
reviews.text: Owner Keith and his team did a wonderful job. Modern equipment , honest, knowledgeable, and great work.  I had drainage issue.  Came out right away for a free estimate.  Access wasn't easy but he showed me using a camera exactly what was going on and offered alternatives.  Keith took care of working with the village and identifying all the lines.  His pricing was good and fair.  The work was done as quickly as possible and was quality work.  Cleaned up everything nicely.  I will use them again and recommend them to everyone.

reviews.author: Jeffrey Bautch
reviews.text: We needed a sewer lateral in our basement repaired and Keith from KBI Plumbing came out immediately to give us a free estimate, which was a great deal more reasonable than the previous contractor had quoted. They were right on time the day the work was scheduled to be done. Their crew was very polite and did a fantastic job. They cleaned everything up, it was left spotless! I would HIGHLY RECOMMEND them! They did an excellent job and were very reasonably priced.

synthesis.summary: K.B.I Sewer & Drainage demonstrates excellent emergency responsiveness and reliability, with Keith Jr. providing same-day Sunday service for sewage backups. All reviews highlight professional service, fair pricing, and quality workmanship, making them a strong choice for emergency plumbing needs.
synthesis.topQuote: I had a Sunday afternoon backup of sewage in my basement floor drain. I called and spoke to Keith Jr., who made it by the same day within a couple hours. He talked me through the process and accurately quoted me the cost over the phone.

plumbers.name: Dave's Plumbing & Repair Service, Inc.
plumbers.address: 732 Tek Dr STE D, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Barbara Boissonnas
reviews.text: Dave's Plumbing was recommended when I needed someone to find and fix a leak downstairs that no one could locate. It was making my ejection pit pump run every 20 minutes, and I was afraid the pump would fail. So many people, including other professionals that I hired, had searched everywhere down there and given up. Colin came the same day, determined to find it and fix it -- and he did! He was totally professional and polite, a pleasure to work with. What a relief to finally have a smart, experienced plumber at a very reasonable cost. I will use Dave's Plumbing from now on and highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Liz Cook (Pomaraptor)
reviews.text: Dave and his crew came to my house and replaced a broken pump. We just purchased a house and had water backing up from the drain.  Dave explained everything, taking his time to make sure I understood all available options.  The pricing was reasonable and the service was outstanding.  We were so happy with Dave and his staff that we had them come back a few days later to replace the sump pump.  Upon completion of each install  I received an explanation of what was installed, how it works, and when I need to contact them if something goes wrong.  The install sight was clean when they left.  We will use Dave for all future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Kurt Waatti
reviews.text:
Dave,
Thank you for going "above and beyond" in the installation of the new garbage disposal, despite the obstacles encountered from the previous installation, which turned a 1 hour job or less into a 3 hour job. You stuck with it until the job was done and didn't raise the price showing conscientious respect for adhering to the deal and respectfulness to your customers.

I highly recommend Dave's Plumbing & Repair Service to anyone who wants an honest plumbing service with integrity.
Kurt J. Waatti

reviews.author: Scot Berndt
reviews.text: Dave's Plumbing came out and repaired issues with two toilets that a previous (licensed) plumbing contractor misdiagnosed. The cost to repair the underlying issue for both toilets was essentially the same price I paid the previous plumber to simply reseat the two toilets. Dave's Plumbing was thorough and their communication was excellent. Pricing was very reasonable. All work was accomplished the same day.

reviews.author: S L Watkins
reviews.text:
3/6/26
Had Dave come out and install new sump and backup pumps. Spring is heat and mine was no longer working. He did a great job, cleaned up, and the work is top notch!

I continue to use Dave’s because he is honest and doesn’t cut corners. I know he is going to do a great job and quality work. Thank you Dave for coming out and installing our water heater.

synthesis.summary: Dave's Plumbing demonstrates exceptional problem-solving skills and reliability, with multiple reviews highlighting their ability to diagnose and fix issues that other plumbers couldn't solve. They provide same-day service, honest pricing, and thorough explanations of their work.
strengths: Solves complex problems other plumbers can't
Honest pricing with no surprise increases
synthesis.topQuote: Colin came the same day, determined to find it and fix it -- and he did! So many people, including other professionals that I hired, had searched everywhere down there and given up.

plumbers.name: JVS Plumbing Co
plumbers.address: 5211 Mann Dr Unit D, Ringwood, IL 60072, USA

reviews.author: catherine peters
reviews.text:
Just had a wonderful experience with Christian from JVS plumbing.  Christian was at my home for a water heater installation.   He arrived right on time, was respectful of my flooring, making sure he covered everything, and took the old tank with him.  He was very personable and finished the job quickly.
Pricing was the best offered out of 7 different local plumbers.  I would highly recommend JVS for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Shar Wade
reviews.text: I called due to a leak with my hot water heater.  I left a message and got a return call within a few minutes.  JVS was able to send someone out in less than an hour! Christian was able to fix the leak quickly.  He was very professional about everything.  I thought the price was reasonable.  I would recommend JVS Plumbing Company to anyone for their plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Tom Zambito
reviews.text: I recently purchased a new home, the appliances, not so new, so I requested a home warranty from the seller. Our 17 yr old hot water heater went out with all the fun stuff, water leaking all over, etc. Dealing with the home warranty co. was exhausting, and said 3-5 days to fix it, plus $1200. Nice. I went on Angi and JVS immediately called to see what was up. Spoke with the tech, explained the issue and I wanted to go tankless, and he told me he would get back to me in 20 minutes. In 15 minutes, a JVS tech was at my fence flagging me down. I showed him the mess, called his supervisor, his exact words were "I am confident about this". I have never heard those words from a tech about anything. The first contact called, sent a quote, it was $1800 more than the cost from the home warranty and their cheap replacement. He told me that they can install it the next day (Saturday). By 8am, the tech was on time, and began working. Done by 3pm, I had hot water. The entire experience at a time of turmoil was breathtaking. Some companies, just want to work to get stuff done, and JVS Plumbing is one that I shall be calling them the next time something goes boom. The overall service was impeccable, the quality of work was well worth every cent. No BS, no hidden fees, just great work and excellent value.

reviews.author: Ryan McReynolds
reviews.text:
Tried to hire before Christmas. They came out in 2 days to give us an estimate, and he recomended getting it done asap. I called that same day to set up the service, and was told that she would talk to the tech who gave the estimate, and he would call me later that day to set up. He texted to ask if we would be home over the holidays, I said yes, then I was not contacted again for 11 days, and after the holiday. I received a call, from a girl in the office, asking if we had a chance to review our estimate, and would we like to set something up?
Absolutely unacceptable way to run a business. Do not try to hire. Not that they would want the job anyway.

reviews.author: Mike and Lane Schlagel
reviews.text: JVS Plumbing did a fantastic job of replacing our water pipe. They were polite, professional, and good at communicating about the process. They also cleaned up everything exceptionally well. We would highly recommend them!

synthesis.summary: JVS Plumbing shows strong emergency response capabilities with same-day service and professional work, particularly excelling at water heater repairs and replacements. However, their scheduling and follow-up communication can be inconsistent, which may be frustrating during non-emergency situations.
redFlags: Significant communication breakdown in scheduling follow-ups
synthesis.topQuote: I left a message and got a return call within a few minutes. JVS was able to send someone out in less than hour! Christian was able to fix the leak quickly.
synthesis.worstQuote: I was not contacted again for 11 days, and after the holiday... Absolutely unacceptable way to run a business.

plumbers.name: Friendly Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1128 Algonquin Rd, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156, USA

reviews.author: Karen Smith
reviews.text: Michael is terrific! Quick response. Knowledgeable. Friendly and extremely fair. Professional,  respectful, direct. Follows through and truly cares. Love this company.  Can't say enough good things!!

reviews.author: Paulette C
reviews.text: Friendly Plumbing is a wonderful company.  We had a leak in our storage area and were so worried about what was happening.  I called Friendly Plumbing and Michael was here the next day.  Looked at the issue and told me all I needed was an end cap on a vent pipe and he wouldn't take any payment from me. So nice to work with an honest company.

reviews.author: m m
reviews.text:
I had an emergency water heater issue on a Sunday and called Friendly Plumbing.  Even though they were technically closed, they answered my call, gave me instructions for safety until they could arrive the following morning and provided me with warranty information on the unit within minutes of us talking

The next day when Michael arrived he knew within minutes what the issue was, explained why it malfunctioned and had the faulty parts installed.  Because of the previous days water leak, the unit wouldn’t stay lit because everything was still wet so we set up a large fan to dry it out and he returned later to finalize the repair.  Michael has done other work at my home over the years and it’s always done meticulously, professionally and  of course Friendly!  He’s a plumbing genius!  Fortunately for me he installed a floor drain years ago in the utility closet and that saved my adjoining room’s flooring during this incident

From start to finish this company was amazing- made a tough situation much easier to navigate. Highly recommend them for sll your plumbing needs

reviews.author: Nany Michael
reviews.text:
Total ripoff! I hired them to take a look for a partially clogged toilet. A guy came and asked, if I wanna remodel?!!! I said no
He said; well, it will cost you $825!!!
For what?!! He said we will remove the whole toilet and unclogged.
I told him it’s just a partial clogging. He said:” I know but that’s our price”!!
Total RIPOFF

reviews.author: Susan McKinney
reviews.text: I cannot speak highly enough of Friendly plumbing. The owner is so conscientious. He resolved my tree root drain clog quickly and competently, left the area spotless,  and even resolved an additional issue I had with low water pressure in my faucet. He was also so personable and polite. I would hire him any time.

synthesis.summary: Friendly Plumbing shows strong reliability and honest practices, with the owner Michael receiving praise for quick emergency response and fair pricing. However, one concerning review about excessive pricing for a simple toilet clog suggests potential inconsistency in estimates.
redFlags: One report of excessive pricing ($825 for toilet unclogging)
synthesis.topQuote: Even though they were technically closed, they answered my call, gave me instructions for safety until they could arrive the following morning
synthesis.worstQuote: Total ripoff! I hired them to take a look for a partially clogged toilet... He said we will remove the whole toilet and unclogged... it will cost you $825!!!

plumbers.name: Convenient Plumbing
plumbers.address: 200 South Dr, South Elgin, IL 60177, USA

reviews.author: Ami Engel
reviews.text:
The team at Convenient Plumbing is great. I have used them for years to help with all kinds of needs, large and small. They are responsive and strive to educate you when they are doing repairs so you understand the need. They won’t do a repair if it is not warranted, and they will talk you through those situations as well.

We have had their help with our toilet, the outdoor spigots, the ejector pump, and our water heater. They even did a camera view of the pipe that goes out to the street.

I appreciate their service and certainly recommend their services to others!

reviews.author: Jeremy AmRhein
reviews.text: Had a great experience working with Convenient Plumbing.  They turned my Thursday night nightmare into an early Friday morning solution.  My water heater broke down and Ed and his son Jeremy came the very next morning to diagnose the problem.  After a discussion about the cost to repair versus the cost to replace (10 yr old heater), I decided to replace the unit.  They replaced the unit within a few hours.  Fast, efficient and honest.  Straight forward communication, no upselling or pressure.  Rare to find these days.  Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Joe F
reviews.text: We just had Convenient Plumbing fix an issue with our ejector pit backing up. They were upfront about all charges and options to resolve the issue. They were  amazing, professional, and speedy. Great work, great company.

reviews.author: Leo
reviews.text: They are now my go to plumbing company. Called 3 different plumbers. Ed called me back within minutes and stopped by within 15 to take a look at what needed to be done. Quoted me on the spot, scheduled to have the village shut off the water a few days later and was here a few minutes after the water was turned off. Ed and Jeremy worked quickly, explained everything and answered all my questions. They did a great job and I will definitely recommend them to anyone needing a professional plumber.

reviews.author: Carlos Durand
reviews.text: Had recently needed our ejector pump replaced, called and was quoted properly over the phone and the work was done within 2-3 hours of me calling, and here I thought I was just going to be calling to schedule! Walked me through what was done and some tips with the new pump, highly recommend for anyone in the Fox Valley area that is looking for both reliable and speedy plumbing service!

synthesis.summary: Convenient Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability and emergency responsiveness, with customers consistently praising their quick response times and honest pricing. Ed and his team have built a strong reputation for same-day service, transparent communication, and quality workmanship across various plumbing needs.
strengths: Extremely fast response times - often same day service
Honest pricing with upfront quotes and no upselling
Educational approach - explains repairs and options clearly
synthesis.topQuote: Called 3 different plumbers. Ed called me back within minutes and stopped by within 15 to take a look at what needed to be done. Quoted me on the spot, scheduled to have the village shut off the water a few days later and was here a few minutes after the water was turned off.

plumbers.name: Cork's Plumbing, Heating, & Cooling
plumbers.address: 10249 Vine St, Huntley, IL 60142, USA

reviews.author: Joel Weideman
reviews.text: My furnace decides to go out when it's zero degrees on a Saturday.  I call Cork's and they find the part for my 20 year old furnace.  Gil shows up and I'm back in business 30 minutes after he arrives.  Can't ask for more than that!!!  They do great plumbing work too!

reviews.author: J. M.
reviews.text:
Needed 2 bathroom faucets replaced. Dave came out, was prompt, personable, knowledgeable and professional. Very neat. Was appreciative that we emptied out the vanities and gave him room to work.
We've used Cork's several times - replaced toilets, our water heater...
Very reasonable and they do excellent work!
Save yourself some time Googling and collecting estimates, just call Cork's!

reviews.author: Edward P
reviews.text: Came out to fix a code 33 on my furnace, overheating. changed the limit switch that took about a hour, never checked the furnace for other problems that could cause the problem and told me to lower the gas valve if the problem persists a highly dangerous thing to do then took the old part to resell to someone else that was in working order.  $263.00 bill. Never again Corks

reviews.author: Emotional Sobriety Retreat
reviews.text: I called this company for an HVAC repair, and the lady who answered told me they were too busy and didn’t want the business. I’ve honestly never heard anything like that before. If you’re looking for reliable service, I’d suggest finding someone who actually wants to work with customers. I wonder if the owner actually knows the lady is turning people away.

reviews.author: Venkata Seera
reviews.text: The service is very reliable and reasonable price, not over priced like others.  Frank is an amazing person

synthesis.summary: Cork's Plumbing shows strong emergency response capabilities with 24-hour service and quick repairs, but has concerning issues with customer service consistency and technical thoroughness. While they excel at fast furnace and plumbing repairs, some customers report incomplete diagnostics and poor phone service.
weaknesses: Phone staff reportedly turns away business
redFlags: Technician allegedly gave dangerous advice about lowering gas valve
May not thoroughly diagnose root causes of problems
Phone staff reportedly refusing business
synthesis.topQuote: My furnace decides to go out when it's zero degrees on a Saturday. I call Cork's and they find the part for my 20 year old furnace. Gil shows up and I'm back in business 30 minutes after he arrives. Can't ask for more than that!!!
synthesis.worstQuote: never checked the furnace for other problems that could cause the problem and told me to lower the gas valve if the problem persists a highly dangerous thing to do

plumbers.name: FJ Bero & Co. Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1629 Weld Rd, Elgin, IL 60123, USA

reviews.author: Wendy Wessel
reviews.text: We called to have a kitchen faucet replaced. Jeff set up appt as soon as they could, and Zach - who puit new faucet in- was wonderful. We have an old home and only a certain faucet works. They were so helpful and so glad we called them.

reviews.author: Laura Zorn
reviews.text: F. J. Bero plumbing has helped with our old house plumbing a number of times. I called them this morning and the issue was solved before noon. Excellent service!!!

reviews.author: Korin Stocker
reviews.text: I have been a customer for the past 10+ years and have always had exceptional service. Zach was very professional (and honest) which I definitely appreciated.  He even returned my call after about 15 mins being finished with the job to assist me even more. Keep up the great work FJ Bero!!

reviews.author: John Dahlberg
reviews.text: Second time in the last 8 days that we have used the services of F.J. Bero Plumbing.  Zach, from Bero was prompt, courteous, knowledgeable and efficient.  We have used F.J. Bero Plumbing for years.  We find their entire service team to be friendly, professional and skilled in all facets of plumbing. They show up on time and get the job done right the first time - every time! A special thanks to Jeff Bero to making sure our clogged drain issue was addressed before the Christmas Holiday weekend.

reviews.author: David Crail
reviews.text:
I've used FJ Bero 3 times now, most recently in January 2024. The response was very timely from when I requested an appointment to when the appointment occurred. Zach addressed all of my questions and successfully handled the issues we were having.

I have been very impressed with their knowledge, professionalism, consideration of options I had, competitive pricing and quick turnaround for availability. I would not hesitate to use FJ Bero again with any sort of plumbing needs that I may have.

synthesis.summary: FJ Bero & Co. Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability and professionalism, with multiple customers using their services repeatedly over many years. They show strong responsiveness for urgent issues and have particular expertise with older homes, though 24-hour emergency availability is unclear.
synthesis.topQuote: I called them this morning and the issue was solved before noon. Excellent service!!!

plumbers.name: Suburban Sewer & Septic Inc.
plumbers.address: 17201 Jefferson St, Union, IL 60180, USA

reviews.author: Rosanne Derango
reviews.text: Absolutely the best customer service.  We had a broken waste line and Kyle came out at midnight to confirm.  Rest of the crew came today and fixed it.  Excellent work. Nice people.  Honest.  They don't make them like this anymore.  Family run business we would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Julie Palmisano
reviews.text:
I hope it's okay to say THANK YOU to your company who not only came out to look at our concern the very next morning, but took the time to educate us and give us options for repair.

We called three seperate companies and yours showed up, crawled under our pipes, and provided a reasonable quote. The work you did was greatly appreciated, the guys were very detailed, and job was done by the afternoon. Thank you!
-Steve & Julie Palmisano

reviews.author: Christina DeRaedt- Robledo
reviews.text: We have been using the family owned Suburban Sewer and Septic since the late 1980s. They have always been the best in the area for all of our needs. From a rodding of sink or floor drain to a larger repair of the sewer line between the house and the street. Randy, Jeff, and Kyle have always been our go to when in need.

reviews.author: Steve Lazzerini
reviews.text: The guys came by Friday first thing and fixed our leaky toilet and leaky laundry tub. Good work ethic and they knew what they were doing. We will definitely call them with all of our plumbing needs. Thanks guys.

reviews.author: Gary Esterling
reviews.text: Totally not dependable.  1st call -did not bring proper equipment. second call - routed out old cast iron pipe but did not water jet the entire length which made for overflowed sewer again because of debris left in the pipe.    Would not recommend. Not professional

synthesis.summary: Suburban Sewer & Septic is a family-owned business with strong emergency response capabilities and excellent customer service, as evidenced by midnight service calls and next-day availability. While most customers praise their professionalism and quality work, there's one concerning review about incomplete work that required callbacks.
weaknesses: May lack proper equipment on first visit
redFlags: One customer reported work was not completed properly, requiring multiple service calls
synthesis.topQuote: We had a broken waste line and Kyle came out at midnight to confirm. Rest of the crew came today and fixed it. Excellent work. Nice people. Honest. They don't make them like this anymore.
synthesis.worstQuote: Totally not dependable. 1st call -did not bring proper equipment. second call - routed out old cast iron pipe but did not water jet the entire length which made for overflowed sewer again because of debris left in the pipe.

plumbers.name: Hartwig Mechanical
plumbers.address: 20800 E Brink St, Harvard, IL 60033, USA

reviews.author: josh rowe
reviews.text:
Hopefully you do better work than your team drives.  Plate number 3750157 thinks he’s in a race van.   Not a very good impression for a business.

After going through the other reviews I just had to edit.  Do you actually verify drivers licenses??

reviews.author: Brittny Jablonski
reviews.text: One of your drivers just straight up ran a red light in downtown west Dundee just now. And then when I passed him I saw he was on his phone. Please tell your drivers to be safe, as some of us have precious cargo (kids) in our vehicles.

reviews.author: Joe Joe The Circus Clown
reviews.text:
If your company’s work is anything like the behavior of your drivers, I wouldn’t trust you to paint a fence, let alone handle a professional job.
Absolutely disgraceful that someone representing your business drives like a maniac, tailgating and endangering others on the road. A quick look at your reviews shows years of the same complaints so clearly this isn’t an isolated issue, it’s a company problem.
Either you condone this reckless behavior, or your drivers are out of control. Either way, it’s unsafe, unprofessional, and unacceptable. If your team is in that much of a rush, maybe they should sign up for DoorDash instead.
Do better, though based on your track record, I won’t be holding my breath.

reviews.author: Kelly Plath
reviews.text: I had a pipe burst in my basement and was given the recommendation to call Hartwig to help. Not only did they respond with a tech at my house within an hour, but he did the work so quickly and clean. He was very kind and helpful. They made a very stressful situation feel calm and easy. I'm grateful for their work.

reviews.author: Abstrakt Marketing
reviews.text: We love partnering with the Hartwig team! They are so easy to work with - always great communicators and very informative.

synthesis.summary: While Hartwig Mechanical shows promise with quick emergency response (within an hour for a pipe burst), multiple reviews consistently cite dangerous driving behavior by their technicians. The limited positive feedback about actual work quality is overshadowed by serious safety concerns about their drivers.
redFlags: Multiple complaints about reckless driving and phone use while driving
Pattern of dangerous behavior spanning years
Safety concerns with company vehicles
synthesis.topQuote: Not only did they respond with a tech at my house within an hour, but he did the work so quickly and clean. He was very kind and helpful.
synthesis.worstQuote: One of your drivers just straight up ran a red light in downtown west Dundee just now. And then when I passed him I saw he was on his phone.

plumbers.name: Drainmaster Sewer & Plumbing LLC
plumbers.address: 1302 Raymond St, South Elgin, IL 60177, USA

reviews.author: Rachael Ivanovic
reviews.text:
Stop searching and hire The Tim’s. 100/5 stars. If you need someone who is honest, does great work, is extremely knowledgeable, goes above and beyond AND has fair pricing, you found them.

We are SO lucky we found them. Our situation sucked but it could have been way worse (and frankly, 5x the cost). They communicated at every stage of the project, explained what was going on and what to expect and prepare for. They worked in single digit weather, early mornings/weekend/late nights, did everything possible to limit the cost, and really went the extra mile to complete the job although they had to move their schedule around.

We had a leak in a pipe in the yard. It became urgent when we started to get water in the basement. They moved their schedule around, got the permits, rented the equipment, etc in the matter of about a day. Most people would have told us “oh well you’ll have to wait”, but the Tims CARE and that’s the difference. When they identified another issue, they already had the plan of attack in motion. Although they told us it was most likely impossible, they worked literal magic so that we didn’t have to replace concrete that was poured this past year, saving us a lot of money, stress, and time. Overall, they did EVERYTHING they could to take care of us and our situation, and made a really stressful situation as pain free as possible. I cannot even begin to express how grateful I am.

reviews.author: Mark Whipple
reviews.text:
Drain Masters was recommended to me by two friends at the gym for what I thought was a plugged toilet drain line.  They came by within a day of my call, diagnosed the problem at no charge, and told me I could fix it myself, or have them repair the issue at what I thought was a pretty reasonable price.

I elected to do it myself to save the money as it was a pretty simple fix.  They were honest and comfortable to deal with.  I will definitely be calling these guys again for any plumbing issues I have.

reviews.author: Cheri Patrick
reviews.text: This is the second time we’ve used drain master to route our Floor drain by washer/dryer prevent back ups!  They are Extremely professional, and   cleaned the area after the work was done. They charged a reasonable fee, they were  on time and full of helpful information.  I would highly recommend them to anyone in the area who Have plumbing issues.

reviews.author: Jen Duberville
reviews.text: I needed some help fixing an underground downspout drain that I shattered while digging out a shrub in my garden. Tim was incredibly responsive, prices were competitive, the job was done quickly and no mess was left behind. DSP's card has found its rightful place on my fridge and they will be my first call if a future plumbing need arises.

reviews.author: Kaitlyn Hudgins
reviews.text: These guys were super helpful and informative, and very professional and friendly! They had my toilet issues assessed and fixed in no time! Will definitely call them again!! Thanks Tim & team!

synthesis.summary: Drainmaster Sewer & Plumbing LLC demonstrates exceptional emergency responsiveness and customer care, with multiple reviews highlighting their ability to rearrange schedules for urgent situations. Their honest approach, competitive pricing, and willingness to go above and beyond make them a reliable choice for emergency plumbing needs.
strengths: Willing to rearrange schedules for urgent needs
weaknesses: No negative feedback to gauge problem resolution
synthesis.topQuote: They moved their schedule around, got the permits, rented the equipment, etc in the matter of about a day. Most people would have told us 'oh well you'll have to wait', but the Tims CARE and that's the difference.

plumbers.name: All Family Plumbing And Remodeling
plumbers.address: 321 Cary Point Dr, Cary, IL 60013, USA

reviews.author: Lisa Lonigro
reviews.text: John and his crew were great! My sewer line was full of roots and starting to back up into my house. The company that I had been using for the last 3 years refused to come out because they said I didn't live in a convenient enough location for them to continue to service me. Then I was in a bind, but John talked to me, I explained my situation and how the other company kept me waiting almost 3 weeks and then refused to come. John came the next day to help me out. He did a wonderful job and now I have peace of mind and no more sewer back up. They were quick and efficient and very helpful. They even checked my water heater for me because it was turned up to high, so they turned it down to a safer level for me for no charge. He has a new customer in me. Thanks All Family Plumbing!

reviews.author: Kathrine Clarke
reviews.text: Amazing service! We called Thursday evening and they were able to send someone Friday morning. The plumbers (Don and Shawn) were so helpful, clean, and determined to find the problem. They stayed calm and kept great humor throughout the call. The service operators were super nice and friendly too.

reviews.author: Mark Paulsen
reviews.text:
I recently had a water spigot installed (Aquor Water Systems V2) in my backyard by All Family Plumbing, and I couldn't be more pleased with the service! From start to finish, the experience was exceptional. They were prompt, professional, and incredibly knowledgeable.

The installation itself was seamless, they worked efficiently, and they left no mess behind. The new spigot functions perfectly, and the quality of the work is evident. It’s clear that All Family Plumbing takes pride in their craft and strives for customer satisfaction.

I highly recommend All Family Plumbing for any plumbing needs. Their skill, reliability, and outstanding service truly deserve five stars. Thank you for a job well done!

reviews.author: N E
reviews.text: I have used All Family Plumbing for years, they always do a stellar job. One time they came to the house because I had a problem with my kitchen faucet - turns out it was a loose screw, literally. 🤦🏻‍♀️ They refused to charge me! Another time the owner, John, replaced the piping under my kitchen sink . For years I’d had problems with the pipes coming loose and leaking due to the way the original pipes were placed. John reworked the piping and told me if I ever have a problem again he’d fix it for free. That was 10 years ago. Love these guys!

reviews.author: Eric Thrasher
reviews.text: Our gratitude to John and All Family Plumbing And Remodeling cannot be overstated. When we experienced a major water line issue in our home late this evening, they responded promptly and professionally. Their expertise and dedication were second to none, and they quickly diagnosed and resolved the problem to ensure our main water supply was restored for everyone in the house. Their dedication to customer satisfaction was truly remarkable. We highly recommend  John and All Family Plumbing And Remodeling for all plumbing needs, as they provided excellent service during our major water line issue.

synthesis.summary: All Family Plumbing shows strong emergency responsiveness and customer service, with multiple reviews highlighting next-day service and professional handling of urgent issues. However, with only 36 total reviews and a 3.7/5 rating, there may be some service inconsistencies not reflected in these positive reviews.
weaknesses: Overall Google rating lower than review quality suggests
synthesis.topQuote: John came the next day to help me out. He did a wonderful job and now I have peace of mind and no more sewer back up. They were quick and efficient and very helpful.

plumbers.name: A&T Plumbing Inc.& Son
plumbers.address: 77 Old Farm Ln, Carpentersville, IL 60110, USA

reviews.author: Paula Lauer
reviews.text: Honest, competitive, and they’ve always been there when I needed them. Would not hesitate to recommend! I appreciate doing business with a local, family owned business that has been in the community for over 40 years. Great company, excellent workmanship, they always use quality parts, and they take great pride in their work. A&T Plumbing is the best!

reviews.author: Amanda Overbee
reviews.text: We are super happy with the work A&T Plumbing Inc.&Son did today replacing our hot water heater and toilet. Everything looks great 👍 Lee was very responsive when we called in and gave us a great price. Logan was very punctual, polite and meticulous and did a great job on the installs. We will definitely call A&T in the future for any plumbing needs and will definitely refer them to anyone looking for a great plumbing service!

reviews.author: Derek Thomas
reviews.text: This is the only plumber we use! Knowledgeable and budget friendly! Beautiful work done and clean up was perfect. Amazing work and friendly staff. Highly recommend. Scott and Brandon were amazing. Logan has been to our house for other services and has been amazing! You can’t go wrong with the quality, reliability and professionalism that A&T provides our community. Big thanks

reviews.author: Sheri Lathrop
reviews.text:
We contacted A&T Plumbing due to a leaking expansion tank on our water heater.
Logan Mayer came out within the hour and promptly replaced it. The service was excellent and the price extremely fair. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: David Migliore
reviews.text: I just wanted to take a minute to detail the high end professionalism and excellent craftsmanship this particular company has displayed throughout my almost 20 year business dealings with them.  First off this is a second generation establishment and credit due to the original OG Mr. Lee Pearson. He has taken his time transitioning this company to his son Leth as I understand it.  Leth has been equally as professional and qualified. AT&T Plumbing is fair, detailed and straight forward. Leth has taken the qualities his father instilled in him and expanded upon them. His team is 1st rate. Shoes off at the door, I’ve personally seen them carry multiple water heaters up and down stairs while making sure first and foremost they do not damage my home. The installation was quick and precise. I’ve used them to install heaters in my personal garage which turned out perfect for Chicago winters. They have worked for my company when other plumbers were perplexed and confused what the issue was to backing up toilets. They came back 4 times finally breaking up concrete and finding an old antiquated piece of pipe that was leaking underground from the 70 year old building They fixed the pipe, hauled out all the insane amount of broken concrete from jackhammering. I have to take a second to compliment AT&T’s associates Logan and Scott. They hauled bucket after bucket of broken concrete for 8 hours up 2 flights of stairs then brought back pre mix concrete bags and finished with a concrete slab that looked perfect when finished.  I would recommend this company to anyone who is sick of dealing with plumbers who don’t show up, don’t accurately quote jobs and can just generally not be counted on. The owner will always answer the phone once a quote is established and they are always willing to go the extra mile. Merry Christmas guys and thanks again for being a company Northwest IL Suburbanites can count on when your professionalism is needed.

synthesis.summary: A&T Plumbing is a well-established family business with over 40 years in the community, showing strong reliability and craftsmanship. They demonstrate good emergency responsiveness with same-day service and have built long-term customer relationships spanning decades. While 24-hour availability is unclear, their track record suggests they're a solid choice for urgent plumbing needs.
strengths: Excellent emergency response - came within the hour
Professional team that protects customers' homes
weaknesses: Limited sample size with only 33 reviews
synthesis.topQuote: We contacted A&T Plumbing due to a leaking expansion tank on our water heater. Logan Mayer came out within the hour and promptly replaced it. The service was excellent and the price extremely fair.

plumbers.name: HD Plumbing and Heating Inc.
plumbers.address: 860 Commerce Dr, South Elgin, IL 60177, USA

reviews.author: Gina Gambrell
reviews.text: Lucky me had my checking account scammed again and the teller said this name was where the card was used at. Im in a pickle again after the scam artist jacked me up once again. Im still unsure as to wether this is the place it was used but the first one with the same name popped up on Google  search. You all be safe while clicking on anything online because there are low life's that dont care about nobody but themselves!

reviews.author: Mindy Kaplan
reviews.text: HD Plumbing & Heating was superb!  The call center was responsive, management was accurate with their general estimates, and the plumber who came to do the work was knowledgeable, friendly, and efficient.  Their prices were also much more reasonable than almost all of their competitors who I spoke with for estimates. I would definitely use this company again for any of my plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Gary Medley
reviews.text:
I called HD because we recently had a leak start in our current water heater. Not only was the company out within 24hrs to assess the situation but also in no way pressured us to replace our current unit, rather, they made us feel comfortable by letting us know we had “some time” to decide what we wanted to do.

I actually received a call from one of the owners the following day to go over all our options. He was very honest in what direction to go with all the different options. My wife and I cannot speak highly enough about our experience with them or their installers who were also amazing, polite and beyond professional not to mention how clean they installed the new water heater.

reviews.author: Nichole Brunson
reviews.text:
We recently had an issue in the basement and water was coming up from who knows where (well we didn't).  HD Plumbing and Heating had someone over so quickly, removed the old ejector pump, installed a new one, cleaned up the water and explained it all to me!  In the past HD has installed a RO system, which has been a great addition and nice to work with them in a non-emergency service appointment as well :)
The team is so friendly and reliable.  We felt good knowing the plumbing work was done correctly!  It's good to be able to trust a company like we do HD Plumbing and Heating!

reviews.author: Debbie Bryant
reviews.text: This company was recommended by my boss who had used HD for all the plumbing work in his new home.  So when we decided to install a RO system, I gave them a call.  The installation included a faucet at the kitchen sink as well as a line for the fridge.  They arrived on time, finished quickly, left the work area spotless and made a follow-up call to verify satisfaction with the product and service.  Very pleased with both!!  Will definitely use them again.

synthesis.summary: HD Plumbing and Heating appears to be a reliable, honest company with quick emergency response and competitive pricing. Multiple customers praise their fast service, professional installers, and follow-up care, making them a solid choice for both emergency and routine plumbing work.
synthesis.topQuote: Not only was the company out within 24hrs to assess the situation but also in no way pressured us to replace our current unit, rather, they made us feel comfortable by letting us know we had 'some time' to decide what we wanted to do.

plumbers.name: McHenry Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 1903 State Rte 31, McHenry, IL 60050, USA

reviews.author: Judy Macdonald
reviews.text: McHenry Plumbing just completed a big job for me and I was very pleased with the results. The technicians knew their job and proceeded very efficiently to get the work done as quickly as possible. What I really appreciated was that they answered my questions about the work very clearly and in sufficient detail. They were careful about my house and cleaned up thoroughly when finished. I plan to use this company again!

reviews.author: corey lersch
reviews.text: Michael was very professional and kind when he did his initial visit. He came up with a great plan and was able to execute it to great affect! I had many plumbers come out and his plan was the best and for the best price. Will be using them for any other plumbing projects I need.

reviews.author: Donna Chapman
reviews.text:
Highly recommend McHenry Plumbing and Heating!  It was their no call day but they sent a very nice friendly look alike Santa gentleman out. He came right away and fixes my problem.
I have had McHenry plumbing before and they are definitely the best!!!

reviews.author: Lori Rotolo
reviews.text: I've used McHenry Plumbing for my AC/Furnace/water heater needs for years.  Recently I had several plumbing issues needing attention.  Johnny came over and took the time to show and explain what was needed and gave me some great suggestions as well.  I called back a week later for something else and Johhny was able to come over that same day.  He's a total professional with a wealth of knowledge and I would recommend him to anyone!  Honestly you do get your moneys worth with this company!

reviews.author: Moises P
reviews.text: I'm extremely happy with the quality and responsiveness of McHenry Plumbing, Inc. They sent out Jeremy Sheldon to do a diagnostic on a leaking shower. He called ahead of time to notify us that he was on his way. Once onsite, he was quick to figure out the issue and we got the shower unit back to normal in no time. I would definitely recommend the entire team to anyone in need of plumbing repairs! Thanks McHenry Plumbing, Inc!

synthesis.summary: McHenry Plumbing shows strong technical skills and professionalism across 31 reviews with a 4.8 rating. Customers consistently praise their knowledge, efficiency, and thorough explanations, though the limited review sample and unknown 24-hour availability make it hard to assess emergency response capabilities.
synthesis.topQuote: I had many plumbers come out and his plan was the best and for the best price. Will be using them for any other plumbing projects I need.

plumbers.name: Allegiance Service Group, Inc
plumbers.address: 4410 IL-176 Suite 4, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Ajay Patel
reviews.text: Great customer service. Very friendly people got the work done before time and all new widows look awesome. Highly recommend them. Very professional work. Will definitely do business with them again.

reviews.author: Matt Silhavy
reviews.text: Andrew at Allegiance was awesome to work with.  He was able to get out the same day we called and was extremely friendly and great to work with.  He helped identify a leak in a pipe due to the cold in a home we were considering purchasing and was able to provide great insight on next steps, potential cost and issues it may cause down the line.  Highly recommended this company.

reviews.author: Joshua Carey
reviews.text: Tech was wonderful! Very knowledgeable and explained things as he was going along.  After he left I noticed our basement was having an issue with the sump pump and he came back right away and was able to adjust the pipe from spraying water out on the concrete floor and didn't charge us for it! Wonderful and will definitely be giving Allegiance my business for plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Jason Bemont
reviews.text: I have never dealt with a more responsive company like this in my life. Allegiance has been there for me through emergency electrical and plumbing work and just about any general contracting work. They are friendly, fairly-priced, and genuinely care for their customers. In a day and age when it is a relief just to get a call back from a service, Allegiance has always been there for me and genuinely cares for its customers.  I was in critical condition in the hospital when my ejector pump failed, and they talked with my father and were here for us the very next day. I will not give my business to anyone else. I wish I could assign more than a five star rating. Do not pass them up.

reviews.author: Mr. Piman
reviews.text: Andrew called ahead to establish appointment time and arrived promptly and with shoe covers, which made my wife and our hardwood floors very happy. Ejector pump was replaced and tested within an hour. Andrew disposed of old pump and left his work area spotless. Efficient, effective and affordable.

synthesis.summary: Allegiance Service Group demonstrates exceptional emergency responsiveness and customer care, with multiple reviews highlighting same-day service and going above and beyond for customers. While they appear to be a general contractor offering multiple services including plumbing, their track record for emergency plumbing situations is very strong based on available reviews.
strengths: Goes above and beyond for customers
weaknesses: Appears to be general contractor not plumbing specialist
synthesis.topQuote: I was in critical condition in the hospital when my ejector pump failed, and they talked with my father and were here for us the very next day. I will not give my business to anyone else.

plumbers.name: Yunke's Plumbing
plumbers.address: 380 Quarry Ln, Algonquin, IL 60102, USA

reviews.author: Tom S
reviews.text: Had issues with a rusty sludge filled water heater and a problem of having to wait for nearly 5 mins to get hot water to our master bath.  Matt switched out our tank type water heaters with a tankless system.  Install is super clean and I no longer have rust water from the tap and hot water flows to all taps in under 30 seconds.  He is a true master plumber!  Highly recommend!!!

reviews.author: Norma Peterson
reviews.text: Yunkie’s Plumbing (Matt) is wonderful!  Very responsive, knowledgeable, respectful. Great quality & he cleaned up everything before he left.  We are so thrilled we finally found a trustworthy plumber!  Do NOT hesitate to hire him.  Our relatives will soon be using him too!

reviews.author: John Rebmann
reviews.text: Matt is awesome, we have used him for a few repairs over the past couple years, he always takes great care of us & his work is excellent.

reviews.author: Kat
reviews.text: I picked this plumber because of 5 star reviews on Google. And he deserves 5 stars. Matt was personable, nice, and responsive. He answered my calls, and communicated well to when he'd be out. Bill was reasonable. Fixed my toilet clog 👍

reviews.author: Jeanette Reinhardt
reviews.text: Matt Yunke had to install a new well pressure tank in our basement.   We called and the next day he was at our home.  Matt gave us a reasonable estimate and we hired him on the spot.  He did an excellent job of installing, soldering and updating all the old pipes attached to the tank.  I am quite happy and would definitely recommend Yunke's Plumbing to anyone who needs a plumber.

synthesis.summary: Yunke's Plumbing shows excellent customer satisfaction with consistent 5-star reviews praising Matt's responsiveness, quality work, and fair pricing. While the limited number of reviews (27) prevents a higher confidence score, customers consistently highlight his reliability and trustworthiness for various plumbing needs.
weaknesses: No specific emergency response time data
synthesis.topQuote: Very responsive, knowledgeable, respectful. Great quality & he cleaned up everything before he left. We are so thrilled we finally found a trustworthy plumber!

plumbers.name: First Response Plumbing
plumbers.address: 176 Detroit St, Cary, IL 60013, USA

reviews.author: Caitlyn O'Brien
reviews.text: If I could leave one star I would. We were serviced by Joey. Very disappointed with this company. Poor communication, unclear pricing, and the issue wasn’t properly fixed. The whole experience felt unprofessional and frustrating. I wouldn’t use them again.

reviews.author: Megan Zdeb
reviews.text: FRP has done a lot for my business & in my home. Very professional and great work. I had my bathrooms redone, new floors and a lot of plumbing work & electrical work. I highly recommend as they have qualified workers for everything.

reviews.author: Kristy L
reviews.text: Joey and his team did a great job swapping out our 50 gallon electric hot water heater with a 75 gallon gas power vent hot water heater. His team knew what they were doing and did a great job. Everyone we worked with from First Response was very kind and happy to help. Joey even worked with my teenage son to help troubleshoot a different issue we were having.  Thanks Joey and Team!

reviews.author: Jon Del Vicario
reviews.text: I CANNOT recommend First Response Plumbing enough! I’ve called First Response Plumbing multiple times now to fix major issues left behind by a former DIY homeowner — including blown pipes that could’ve been a disaster during Memorial Day Weekend. I've had Joe, Nicole, and Dwayne come out to my house, and each time, First Response Plumbing showed up fast, explained everything clearly, and got the job done right without breaking the bank. They're honest, affordable, and get it done with zero hassle. I won’t call anyone else.

reviews.author: Tim Alonso
reviews.text:
First Response truly lives up to their name. I called when our hot water heater sprung a leak around 11:30pm on a Saturday.  Joey was at our door by midnight for a diagnosis, back with a replacement unit bright and early on Sunday morning, and completed the installation before noon.

On top of the quick response, he gave us a fair price and took the time to walk me through the details of the installation and warranty.  To say that we're blown away is an understatement! I called when we were in a bind and am happy to now have a go-to resource for any of our future plumbing needs.

synthesis.summary: First Response Plumbing shows strong emergency response capabilities with multiple customers praising their speed and availability, including midnight service calls. While they have one concerning review about communication and pricing issues, the majority of feedback indicates reliable, professional service at fair prices.
synthesis.topQuote: I called when our hot water heater sprung a leak around 11:30pm on a Saturday. Joey was at our door by midnight for a diagnosis, back with a replacement unit bright and early on Sunday morning, and completed the installation before noon.
synthesis.worstQuote: Poor communication, unclear pricing, and the issue wasn't properly fixed. The whole experience felt unprofessional and frustrating.

plumbers.name: Norman Mechanical Inc
plumbers.address: 1201 Gateway Dr, Elgin, IL 60124, USA

reviews.author: Domel D
reviews.text: Absolutely terrible service.  2nd time in 3 years my HOA had these guys work in our building and they caused major damage.  First time during a water shut off, my unit was damaged and they were not held accountable.  Now fast forward 2 years and they were performing some sort of pipe cleaning on a higher level garage which somehow ended up flooding my entire storage unit down below due to negligence and incompetence.  When i spoke to Bill he told me tough luck and he was rude and said he dosnt work for me so tough luck.  I will be filing an attorney general complaint against norman mechanical, as well as a better business complaint, as well as have retained counsel.  They will most definitely be held accountable and pay for the damages they caused.  Bill if you read this, feel free to call me with a better attitude and a good solution on how you will fix this situation.

reviews.author: Scott Stroope
reviews.text: We had a pipe break in the basement on Sunday, we called and Joe came out, he arrived quickly was courteous, knowledgeable and focused on getting our issue addressed quickly.  He completed the repair efficiently and made sure everything was corrected also offering suggestions for better water pressure in this 100+ year old house!  Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Susan
reviews.text: Joe was fantastic! He installed all new kitchen faucets+ about three months ago. He worked quickly, but diligently. He just did his job without chit chatting, complaining - very respectable... Our instant hot tank had a small issue with a short tube connection, but he came up with a creative solution. Said nothing about difficulty to park (another plumber showed up and left without doing the install due to parking). I would highly recommend Joe and will hire him again!

reviews.author: gretchen collins
reviews.text: No hot water.  I called Norman Mechanical, spoke with Billy and within 2 hours plumber was at my house.  Joe inspected and found 4 gas leaks.  Very lucky my house didn’t blow up!  Joe replaced gas lines, double checked everything and hot water is back on.  Thank you Norman Mechanical!

reviews.author: Nick Schmitt
reviews.text: I had a fantastic experience working with Billy and Norman Mechanical. They did an excellent job resolving my sewer drain issue and they explained everything thoroughly and clearly. I was impressed by the communication we received from Billy and the plumber who came over. They were very professional and I highly recommend this company.

synthesis.summary: Norman Mechanical shows strong technical skills and emergency responsiveness, with most customers praising Joe's expertise and quick service. However, there's a serious concern about accountability when damage occurs, with one customer reporting property damage and unprofessional handling by management.

History of causing damage during HOA work
synthesis.topQuote: Joe inspected and found 4 gas leaks. Very lucky my house didn't blow up! Joe replaced gas lines, double checked everything and hot water is back on.

plumbers.name: Community Plumbing Company
plumbers.address: 326 E Judd St, Woodstock, IL 60098, USA

reviews.author: Valerie Williams
reviews.text: From calling to installing a new water heater was less than 3 hours. Efficiency and reliability! Thank you for making my day!!

reviews.author: Donna Tuman
reviews.text: I believe in supporting local. Had what I believed to be a water leak. They came out diagnosed the need for a replacement was really going to try and come back out the same day but not likely when the leak worsened overnight they were out early on Friday and did a wonderful job. If you need plumbing work I highly recommend. They were recommend by Woodstock Heating another local I support.

reviews.author: Tonya Mondelli
reviews.text: Quick to call you back when you need work done. However once they get their money they ignore you. They came out and installed a new water heater. Ours was under warranty and they said we would have to pay up front and they would reimburse us when they got the refund from the water heater. That was over three months ago. No refund and they won’t return our phone calls. We have called THREE times. First time spoke with a woman and said she would get back to us and never heard back. The last two times we have left messages and silence. Still waiting for my reimbursement.... Not people you can trust. Stole $700 from us.

reviews.author: Larry Watt
reviews.text: The service I got was perfect I went and told him I had a bad water heater they came over checked out the part that was bad I suggested I get a new one then they were over the next day to install the new one with no delay the gentleman was kind add explained everything to me I needed to know about the future of this water heater and proper preventive maintenance thank you for your service and I would suggest Community Plumbing to anybody in this community and Beyond.

reviews.author: Heather Trom
reviews.text: I have had them out to my house twice.  The first time was for an emergency issue I was having, and they were responsive and the rate they charged was very reasonable.  Second time was to fix my ejector pit.  They showed up on time, and again, were pleasant to work with.  The job took a little longer than originally thought, but they stuck to the quoted price and didn't try to up charge me.  I will certainly use they again in the future.

synthesis.summary: Community Plumbing shows strong technical skills and emergency responsiveness, with customers praising their efficiency and reasonable rates. However, a serious complaint about failing to return $700 in promised warranty reimbursement and ignoring follow-up calls raises significant trust concerns.
redFlags: Failed to reimburse $700 warranty refund and ignored multiple customer calls for 3+ months
synthesis.topQuote: From calling to installing a new water heater was less than 3 hours. Efficiency and reliability! Thank you for making my day!!

reviews.author: Michele Taylor (Micky)
reviews.text: Had an emergency situation with a leaking water heater, showed up early, removed, repaired damaged flooring, replaced WH and added a shut off valve!  Professional job, highly recommend!

reviews.author: Bennett A
reviews.text: On the recommendation of my neighbor, I called Reiche Plumbing and couldn't be happier. They tackled a number of issues I had, including some pipe work a previous plumber had messed up. They did it quickly, professionally and at a very reasonable price. Will definitely be using them for all my future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Bob
reviews.text: Ryan is fantastic!  Quick, though and knowledgeable. Always able to handle every issue. Can’t say enough good about this company…..top rate!

reviews.author: Gene Silvers
reviews.text: Best plumbing company in area always friendly and professional fair prices and impeccable work ethic. They stand by all their work and explain everything before doing anything. Ty

reviews.author: Jim Sanaxay
reviews.text:
I needed to get my clean out pipe rodded as I didn't get it done in a few years and I hit up Reiche Plumbing based on a recommendation from my neighbor.  So I gave them a call and made an appointment.  They gave me a few times as to when they could come do my service but I told them that I will not be home unfortunately.  This was NOT a problem for them as I didn't need to be home to perform the service.  I spoke with Ryan and he said they could perform the service and put the invoice in my mailbox and I could send in a check afterwards.  SWEET!

I'd like to say that their pricing was the best out of all the plumbers I've used in the area.

The day of the service came and they came right on time and performed the service and on the invoice wrote exactly what they performed and detailed their findings as they in fact found roots in my pipe!

Overall I was extremely pleased with Reiche Plumbing and I will continue to use them in the future for my future plumbing needs.  A+

synthesis.summary: Reiche Plumbing shows strong reliability and professionalism with perfect 5-star reviews, including proven emergency response capability. While the review count is modest, customers consistently praise their fair pricing, quality work, and trustworthy service practices.

plumbers.name: Anchor Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 1470 Abbott Dr, Elgin, IL 60123, USA

reviews.author: Sophia
reviews.text: I’ve been working with Jeff in the past few years. He is courteous and professional. He’s very responsible and always comes in on time. He also explains to me about the work when I have questions and makes sure everything is as clean as possible. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: James Levin
reviews.text: Great family business that takes really good care of their customers. I take no credit for finding them - we were fortunate to come across Anchor because they had installed the plumbing for the prior owners of our home. We've now had them help us with a few things, including swapping our water heaters with tankless. Great service, great communication. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Tami Zielke
reviews.text: Best Plumbing experience I have ever had! Right from the first phone call I was treated with friendliness and professionalism. Once my appointment was made, Jeff was right on time, he identified the problem and even took the time to explain what work was needed and why. He did quality work and his price was very reasonable. If you want a Plumber who is honest and stands by his work, I highly recommend Jeff and Anchor Plumbing.

reviews.author: Gloria Helin
reviews.text: Jeff and his son have been my plumbers for four years now. I highly recommend them. They always respond when I call. They are efficient and always know what is wrong. I have called other plumbers that you have to wait to call you back or they never respond. Others have left a mess for me to clean up. Their prices are comparable to other plumbers and what they charge. -Debbie Helin-Wetzel

reviews.author: Pam

reviews.text: Kyle is very reliable, knows his stuff very well and works extremely fast! He redid most of our pipes during our extensive remodeling and everything worked like a charm. I highly recommend Yetti Plumbing!

reviews.author: Brett Adkinson
reviews.text: I was referred to Yeti plumbing by a friend and when I called I got Kyle the owner, I explained that I thought I may have a two fold issue in that it appeared I may have had the water heater go and that there appeared to be a clogged floor drain also. Kyle agreed to come out after hours to look at the issue, it turned out that I had a sewer back up which he routed on the spot and also informed us that the water heater did not need to be replaced. There are really no words to express the relief of not only having the issue fixed in a timely manner but the honestly and helpfulness we experienced. It's rare to find people not looking to take advantage of a bad situation but I can say that is exactly what we got from Kyle and Yeti plumbing, I won't use anyone else going forward and would recommend trying this company for any of your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Isaac Melton
reviews.text: Have Yeti is our go-to plumber for both commercial and our plumbing needs at home. Very responsive and always does great work. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Kathy F
reviews.text: Kyle is professional, knowledgeable, and courteous. He is able to assess the problem quickly and repair it efficiently. Kyle has kept me posted on availability and arrival times. Because of the confidence I have in Kyle and Yetti Plumbing I will continue to reach out to them.

reviews.author: joseph conrad III
reviews.text: 9/21/2024 I called and talked to kyle on a Saturday to replace a water heater.  Kyle jump on it right away asked me some simple questions to figure out what was needed.! He had an absolute work shop with him and had everything known to man in his trailer to do any job.!  Kyle was polite, knowledgeable, and understanding of our situation. 10/10 will use again.!

reviews.author: Shalini R.K.
reviews.text: We had Complete Plumbing compete with 2 other companies for work we had done at our business. They were not only the most reasonable in terms of quote, but they were the most professional, organized, and the guys who came out to complete the work were very nice and explained what was going on. They worked quickly, and most importantly cleaned up after they were done. Tina followed up with emails and called to make sure the work was done satisfactorily. I would definitely use them again!

reviews.author: Elvina Jones
reviews.text: Best customer service I've ever received. I called Complete Plumbing needing an evaluation and possible repair of two whirlpool tubs at my house and time was of the essence. Tina, one of the owners who answered the phone listened to my problem, looked at pictures I sent and agreed to help me. We exchanged at least 5 text messages and had that many phone conversations within a half hour. Tina, without my even asking, researched and contacted a whirlpool repair specialist who was better suited for the job - and they are hard to find! Tina sent me their contact information, spoke with them on my behalf, and agreed to be my backup until I was able to make arrangements for the specialist to come to my home. In less than an hour, Tina solved a problem I had been struggling with and stressing over for weeks! So intelligent, committed and responsive! Amazing…. thank you Tina!

reviews.author: Jim Montagnino
reviews.text:
The estimates and scheduling were done with Tina (President of Complete Plumbing Services) who was professional, personable and offer numerous options. All work was clearly spelled out and deliver in written format that was easy to understand. The install was done by Nick, who did a great job. He was very professional, polite, neat and quick in his work.
Very satisfied, actually quite pleased in that they came in under the estimated hours reducing my cost of service.

reviews.text: We had Complete Plumbing replace our water heater yesterday. This is the fifth or sixth time we've worked with them. Every time they've helped us we feel that the work is done extremely well, very professional, for a fair price and have had no problems. We definitely recommend them!

reviews.text: I have used Complete Plumbing for years. For repairs on my central air, to replacing pipes, cleaning my furnace and then replacing my central air unit. Tina and her staff are always helpful. They are timely, honest and do an amazing job!! I will not use anyone else.

reviews.text: Wyatt was here today to install a faucet drain in our powder room. He arrived within 30 mins of his call to alert us that he was coming. reviews.author: Denise Setchell
reviews.text: Highly recommend Schambach Plumbing & Heating.   Travis and Wyatt alleviated an issue we were having with the boiler at our home.  We were unable to sleep in our master bedroom due to (what we learned from Travis was the expansion of the copper pipes knocking against the floor joists).  The noise was so loud and constant that my husband and I could not sleep in our master bedroom.  Travis knew at his first inspection what the issue was and came up with a plan.  His plan is working perfectly, there is no noise and we have been able to sleep.  They were responsive, efficient and courteous and my husband and I could not be happier with the work that was performed.  Thanks guys.

reviews.text: Travis is amazing at his craft. We had to call for a follow up, to no fault of their own, but he was knowledgeable and confident in what needed to be done to rectify the shituation. Thank you, Travis! Thank you, Schambach Plumbing.

reviews.author: Gradient Descent
reviews.text:
We recently had a broken sewer line in our front yard and called MJ Plumbing. Matt and his team were professional, knowledgeable, and efficient. He diagnosed the issue quickly, clearly explained the necessary repairs (even educated me on the process which I personally appreciate), and completed the sewer line replacement promptly with high-quality work. Matt and MJ Plumbing made the process super smooth and resolved our issue completely.

I highly recommend their services and will be using them for plumbing issues in the future!

reviews.author: John Great
reviews.text: Hands down the only plumbing service I'll ever call going forward they were very responsive to my call and questions. The water heater they installed is so much better then the one we had before and instalation was fast and easy. They were personable and thoughtful.

reviews.author: Endless Chapters
reviews.text:
After 2 visits and getting the run around a bit from another plumbing company in Woodstock, I sought recommendations from our town FB page on good and fair plumbers to repair a broken sewer line. The responses were overwhelmingly in favor MJ Plumbing. And I am so grateful they were. Matt was at our house the next day to properly diagnose the issue and explore repair options. Unlike the other company, he took the time to map the issue and do the necessary leg work to find the best repair solution. Whereas the other company handed us an estimate for $5,200 and said they "thought" they knew what the issue was. My husband who is inherently interested in knowing the interworkings of everything, was involved in the entire diagnostic process. Everything was communicated clearly to us. Matt even communicated with us while out of state visiting family, as he knew we were at limited capacity to use water sources in our house for fear of water backing up into our basement. Him and his crew repaired the broken sewer line in just a few hours. During the repair they identified another issue that definitely needed rectifying and only cost us $200 now, but would have cost us thousands later (B Box, which offers access to the water shut off valves, was improperly buried under a foot of dirt, packed with soil, and had no cap. So they raised it, cleared it out, and will be fitting it with a cap to allow appropriate access in the event of an emergency.)

Very grateful to have found MJ Plumbing. Matt and his entire crew were kind and extremely efficient. I feel at ease knowing this issue was handled by competent workers, and won't be an issue 6 months or 6 years down the road. Will be using them going forward for any Plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Doug Kulie
reviews.text: I hired Matthew Haulotte owner of MJ Plumbing to replace a leaking hose bib. While doing so he admittedly cut through electrical wires. I now have multiple outlets that are not working and he is refusing to repair the damages he caused. As a reasonable solution I requested half of the payment I sent him back so that I could hire an electrician to repair the damages he caused and he refused. If you are looking for a reliable plumber that takes responsibility for their actions look elsewhere!

reviews.author: Jon Phelps
reviews.text: These are the guys you want to call for your plumbing needs!  They replaced my water service line in my front yard after another plumber's worked failed.  Matt went to bat for me with the city of Woodstock and got them to pick up the bill.  They took extra time to make sure rocks and debris were not laying on top of the repaired area.  I'm very satisfied with the quality and professionalism!

synthesis.summary: MJ Plumbing shows strong expertise in sewer line repairs and water heater installations with excellent communication and diagnostic skills. However, a concerning incident involving damaged electrical wires and poor responsibility handling raises some reliability concerns for emergency situations.

I will definitely use these guys again and I will recommend them to all my friends and family.

reviews.text: Called on thanksgiving spoke with Akash and he got his tech Jimmy out and fixed a broken valve on thanksgiving they were great will definitely call again! Great pricing too!

reviews.author: Jose Manuel Navar
reviews.text: Akash and his team are the best! We had a clogged shower and they come right away. Best plumbers in town and we would not trust anyone else with our plumbing issues!

reviews.author: Carlos Macias
reviews.text: Great service had a plumbing emergency and they came to fix the issue the same day I called. Joey was our technician and he did a great job. He gave a detailed inspection and a detailed plan on how to fix the issue. I would 100% recommend superior rooter and plumbing.

reviews.author: R Weinstein
reviews.text:
Jimmy and the rest of the team were great! I interacted with 3 members of the team and all were kind, courteous and professional.

My experience with them started off as a non-emergency consultation. Enrique came out right on schedule, we walked thru the issues, and I got a text with the official estimate. He was very clear about what needed to be done and how. He didn't try to scare me into a remodel (yes someone else tried that). I also got estimates from 2 others,  but SR was the best. Their estimate wa comfortably within my budget. NOTHING WAS LEAKING AT THAT TIME so I planned to schedule work early January.

Then I came home to leaking ceiling.  Since they're available 24/7, i called their office. Maria was able to schedule Jimmy to come out within a couple hours. He made sure the pipes were OK, then found the bad seal on my tub. Four hours after coming home my ceiling was no longer leaking, my tub was sealed, and we had plans to fix the rest before the end of the week.

Finally,  the day of the planned project arrived. Jimmy came out early because I had an afternoon commitment. Everything went exactly as he said it would. Time and cost matched my estimate/ consultation EXACTLY. (Luckily no surprises midway thru the project). He wrapped up,  checked his work, and cleaned up.

Will 100% be saving this business to my favorites.

synthesis.summary: Superior Rooter Plumbing consistently delivers same-day emergency service with professional, courteous technicians. Multiple reviews highlight their availability for true emergencies (even on holidays) and competitive pricing compared to other plumbers.
weaknesses: Newer business with less track record
